items.summary_en: This setup guide walks through building a low-latency RDMA cluster using AMD Strix Halo hardware, tailored for running large language models or other AI workloads. It highlights practical considerations like networking, kernel tuning, and software stacks for high throughput.
items.summary_zh: 该搭建指南演示如何在 AMD Strix Halo 硬件上构建低延迟 RDMA 集群，适用于运行大模型等 AI 工作负载。内容涵盖网络、内核调优及高吞吐的软件栈等实操要点。

items.title_en: Optocam Zero: a Pi Zero based digital camera made using off the shelf components
items.title_zh: Optocam Zero：基于 Pi Zero 的现成部件数字相机
items.summary_en: Optocam Zero demonstrates a compact, Pi Zero-based digital camera built entirely from off-the-shelf parts. The project shows how far a tiny board can go with modular components, trading off image quality and battery life for accessibility and affordability.
items.summary_zh: Optocam Zero 展示了一个基于 Pi Zero 的小巧数字相机，用的是现成组件。这个开源硬件项目证明了在极小的单板机上拼装成像设备的可行性，同时也暴露了成像质量和电池寿命等权衡。

items.title_en: HackerRank open sourced its ATS. My resume scored 90/100. Oh wait 74. No – 88
items.title_zh: HackerRank 开源其 ATS，简历评分波动引发关注
items.summary_en: HackerRank released its ATS as open source, exposing how resumes are scored in practice. A single resume yielded a string of conflicting scores (90, then 74, then 88), illustrating instability and potential bias in automated screening. The takeaway: hiring AI needs better transparency, reproducibility, and fairness checks.
items.summary_zh: HackerRank 将其 ATS 开源，使人们能审视简历评分的全过程。一次测试的简历竟得到 90、74、88 等不同分数，凸显自动筛选的不稳定性和潜在偏见。要点是招聘 AI 需加强透明性、可重复性与公平性。

items.title_en: Munich 1991: The Roots of the Current AI Boom
items.title_zh: 慕尼黑 1991：当前 AI 繁荣的根源
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at Munich in 1991 uncovers early ideas and cross-disciplinary conversations that seeded today’s AI boom. It connects discussions about neural networks, compute, and industry interest to the modern AI trajectory. The piece shows how historical moments helped shape today’s AI ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1991年的慕尼黑，揭示推动当今AI 繁荣的早期思想和跨学科对话，尤其是对神经网络、计算资源及产业界关注的讨论如何孕育今天的 AI 生态。文章把历史节点与当前 AI 发展轨迹联系起来，揭示了早期想法如何转化为如今的规模与热潮。

items.title_en: "Fix" MacBook Neo Cursor Lag: Record 1 Pixel of the Screen Every 10 Seconds
items.title_zh: 修复 MacBook Neo 光标卡顿：每 10 秒在屏幕刷新一个像素
items.summary_en: A quirky GitHub gist proposes a workaround for MacBook Neo cursor lag by forcing a single pixel update every 10 seconds. The hack illustrates how developers tinker with OS rendering to squeeze perceived smoothness, revealing the fragility of UI performance on new hardware.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的 GitHub 速记提出了一个修复 MacBook Neo 光标卡顿的变通方法：每 10 秒强制刷新一个像素。此类 hacks 展现了开发者在新硬件上为提升视觉流畅性而进行的微调，也暴露了 UI 性能的脆弱性。

items.title_en: Dolphin Emulator Progress Release 2606
items.title_zh: Dolphin Emulator 2606 进展版本
items.summary_en: Dolphin Emulator’s Progress Release 2606 advances compatibility and stability for GameCube/Wii emulation, with fixes across graphics, input, and performance. Ongoing improvements reflect the project’s steady, community-driven effort toward better high-fidelity emulation.
items.summary_zh: Dolphin Emulator 2606 进展版本进一步提升了 GameCube/Wii 的兼容性与稳定性，覆盖图形、输入与性能等方面的修复。社区驱动的持续改进反映了对更高保真度仿真的不懈追求。

items.title_en: Mexican government unveils a prototype for a new homegrown, ultra-affordable EV
items.title_zh: 墨西哥政府公布全新国产、超便宜的电动汽车原型
items.summary_en: Mexico's government unveiled a prototype for a new, ultra-affordable domestically produced electric vehicle, signaling a push to local EV manufacturing. The move could broaden EV adoption and boost jobs, while raising questions about scale, safety, and subsidies.
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥政府展示了一款极为经济的国产电动车原型，标志着推动本土电动车制造的战略。此举可能促进电动化普及并创造就业，但也带来产能、安全与补贴效果等方面的质疑。

items.title_en: The new HTTP QUERY method explained
items.title_zh: 新 HTTP QUERY 方法解读
items.summary_en: A proposed HTTP QUERY method treats server-side queries as a first-class operation, letting clients submit structured queries and receive results in a standardized way. The write-up outlines expected semantics, payload formats, and caching considerations, and discusses potential benefits for API ergonomics alongside adoption challenges for tooling and proxies.
items.summary_zh: 提出了一种将服务器端查询作为 HTTP 端点的新方法，让客户端提交结构化查询并获得标准化结果。文中讨论了该方法的语义、负载格式与缓存行为，以及它可能带来的 API 设计简化，同时也提出工具链和代理的采用挑战。

items.title_en: Federal agents track down woman, demand she remove Instagram post about ICE
items.title_zh: 联邦特工追踪并逼其删除有关ICE的Instagram帖子
items.summary_en: Federal agents tracked down a Syracuse woman and demanded removal of an Instagram post about ICE, illustrating tensions between government oversight, free expression, and online platforms. The case highlights civil-liberties concerns in the digital age.
items.summary_zh: 联邦特工追踪并要求一名女性删除其关于ICE的Instagram帖子，揭示政府审查与言论自由、以及社交平台之间的张力。这一案例凸显数字时代的公民自由议题。

items.title_en: OpenAI DayBreak – GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.title_zh: OpenAI DayBreak：GPT-5.5-Cyber
items.summary_en: OpenAI's DayBreak program centers on security, showcasing GPT-5.5-Cyber capabilities and a framework for safer AI deployments. The effort outlines safety practices, threat modeling, and collaboration with industry to harden AI systems against cyber threats.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI DayBreak 着眼于安全，展示 GPT-5.5-Cyber 的能力与更安全的 AI 部署框架。该计划强调安全实践、威胁建模，并与行业合作以提升 AI 系统在网络威胁面前的防护能力。

items.title_en: Elevated error rate across multiple models
items.title_zh: 多模型的错误率显著上升
items.summary_en: An incident reports elevated error rates across several Claude models, affecting reliability and productivity. Engineers say investigation is underway and status is being updated.
items.summary_zh: 多款 Claude 模型同时出现较高错误率，影响用户体验与生产力。官方表示正在调查，修复进展将持续更新。

items.title_en: Ford hired AI and sacked humans. It backfired badly
items.title_zh: 福特使用 AI 自动化并解雇员工，结果适得其反
items.summary_en: Ford's push to automate with AI reportedly backfired, causing disruption and unhappy workers, prompting a rethink of where automation adds value. The story cautions against overreliance on AI without aligning with human workflows and corporate culture.
items.summary_zh: 报道称福特将某些工作岗位交给 AI 自动化，结果引发混乱并带来负面后果。故事警示在没有与人类工作流程和企业文化对齐的情况下盲目推动自动化的风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: Oak – Git alternative designed for agents
items.title_zh: Oak—为代理设计的 Git 替代工具
items.summary_en: Show HN: Oak introduces a Git-like workflow tailored for autonomous agents, enabling agent-driven versioning, tracing, and collaboration. It aims to streamline repeated decision-making tasks in AI workflows and improve reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: Oak 提供了面向自主代理的类似 Git 的工作流，支持代理驱动的版本控制、跟踪与协作，旨在简化 AI 工作流中的重复决策并提升可复现性。

items.title_en: A man was gifted his dream car by Kevin Mitnick, who he helped put in prison
items.title_zh: 一名男子被凯文·米特尼克送上梦想之车，米特尼克曾让他入狱
items.summary_en: A man who helped put Kevin Mitnick behind bars is later gifted his long-desired car by Mitnick himself. The story sits at the intersection of hacker lore and personal reconciliation, highlighting the complex history between activists and cybersecurity influencers.
items.summary_zh: 一名曾帮助将凯文·米特尼克送进监狱的男子，后来收到了米特尼克送出的梦想之车。这则故事处在黑客传说与个人和解的交汇点，折射出活动家与网络安全影响者之间复杂的历史。

items.title_en: The minimum viable unit of saleable software
items.title_zh: 可销售软件的最小单元
items.summary_en: Reframes product scope toward selling the smallest units of software rather than chasing a traditional MVP. This helps with pricing, packaging, and avoiding feature creep, guiding teams to ship tangible value sooner.
items.summary_zh: 把产品范围聚焦在可销售的最小单位，而不是追求传统 MVP。这样有助于定价、包装、避免功能堆叠，并促使团队尽快交付可验证的价值。

items.title_en: Good results fine tuning a local LLM like Qwen 3:0.6B to categorize questions
items.title_zh: 用本地模型如 Qwen 3:0.6B 微调以对问题分类取得良好效果
items.summary_en: Fine-tuning a small local LLM (Qwen 3:0.6B) achieves solid performance for categorizing questions, illustrating that on-device models can handle practical tasks with privacy and low latency. The post shares a practical workflow for adapting off-the-shelf LLMs to labeling tasks.
items.summary_zh: 使用本地小型模型（如 Qwen 3:0.6B）进行微调，在对问题进行分类的任务上取得稳健效果，展示了本地推理在隐私和低延迟方面的优势。文中给出将现成的 LLM 调参以完成标注任务的实用工作流。

items.title_en: Millimeter wave technology drills 100 meters into granite
items.title_zh: 毫米波技术钻探花岗岩 100 米
items.summary_en: Millimeter-wave technology claims to drill 100 meters into granite, a notable engineering feat with implications for resource exploration and geotechnical surveys. The result showcases continued progress in directional energy and non-traditional drilling methods.
items.summary_zh: 毫米波技术声称能在花岗岩上钻探到 100 米深度，这是对资源勘探和地质调查的一个重要进展。该成果展示了高频能量在非传统钻探方法中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: AI children's books, body horror edition
items.title_zh: AI儿童读物：身体恐怖版
items.summary_en: A provocative look at AI-generated children's books pushing boundaries with body horror themes, raising concerns about age-appropriateness and the ethics of automated content for young readers. It spotlights the risks of commodifying unsettling content through AI.
items.summary_zh: 对AI生成的儿童读物进行挑衅性评估，揭示身体恐怖等题材对年龄适宜性、伦理边界与青少年读者的潜在影响。此类自动创作的内容也引发对平台监管与伦理界限的讨论。

items.title_en: Show HN: Smart model routing directly in Claude, Codex and Cursor
items.title_zh: Show HN：在 Claude、Codex 与 Cursor 中实现智能模型路由
items.summary_en: A community project demonstrates smart routing that selects among Claude, Codex, and Cursor in real time, optimizing for speed and cost per task. By routing prompts to the most suitable model, it lowers latency and can simplify multi-model workflows.
items.summary_zh: 一个社区项目演示在 Claude、Codex 与 Cursor 之间实现实时智能路由，按任务选择最合适的模型以优化速度和成本。通过智能分发请求，该方案降低延迟并简化多模型工作流。

items.title_en: Thomann takes legal action against Fender
items.title_zh: Thomann 对 Fender 提起诉讼
items.summary_en: Thomann has filed legal action against Fender, suggesting IP or trademark disputes in the guitar market. The case could influence distribution, branding, and licensing across Europe, signaling ongoing fragilities in instrument IP rights.
items.summary_zh: 音乐零售商 Thomann 对 Fender 提起诉讼，涉及乐器领域的知识产权或商标纠纷。此案可能影响欧洲市场的分销、品牌与授权，凸显乐器领域 IP 保护的持续挑战。

items.title_en: Giant Banana Pulled Over: Driver Says Cops Have Stopped Him 100s of Times
items.title_zh: 巨型香蕉被拦下：司机称警察多次拦车
items.summary_en: A quirky local story about a driver claiming police stopped him hundreds of times over a giant banana, highlighting how odd anecdotes spread online.
items.summary_zh: 一个关于司机因巨型香蕉而声称被警察多次拦下的怪异本地新闻，凸显这类离奇轶事在网上的传播。

items.title_en: AI in mathematics is forcing big questions
items.title_zh: AI 在数学领域催生重大问题
items.summary_en: AI is prompting mathematicians to rethink proofs, collaboration with machines, and the nature of reasoning. The discussion centers on rigor, reproducibility, and how AI as a tool may shape discovery and verification in math.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能正在促使数学家重新审视证明、与机器的协作以及推理的本质。讨论聚焦于严格性、可复现性，以及 AI 作为工具在数学发现与验证中的作用。

items.title_en: GitHub shouldn't be a dependency for publishing Rust on crates.io
items.title_zh: GitHub不应成为在crates.io发布Rust包的依赖项
items.summary_en: Calls to decouple Rust crate publishing from GitHub argue for more resilient publishing workflows, reducing outages and rate limits from a single platform. Proposals include alternative registries or packaging approaches to improve supply-chain reliability.
items.summary_zh: 呼吁将 Rust 包在 crates.io 的发布与 GitHub 解绑，以提高发布流程的韧性，降低单点故障对生态的冲击。建议采用替代注册库或打包方法来提升供应链的可靠性。

items.title_en: Ending respiratory infections
items.title_zh: 终结呼吸道感染的努力
items.summary_en: Explores funding and strategies aimed at reducing respiratory infections, from vaccines and antivirals to global health initiatives. The discussion emphasizes multi-pronged, equity-focused approaches to tamp down preventable diseases.
items.summary_zh: 探讨减少呼吸道感染的资金与策略，涵盖疫苗、抗病毒药物以及全球公共卫生举措。强调以多方位、关注公平的方式来降低可预防疾病的负担。

items.title_en: My Steam Machine is a 50ft HDMI cable
items.title_zh: 我的 Steam 机是一根50英尺的 HDMI 线
items.summary_en: Long HDMI cables can introduce latency and signal integrity challenges, and the post chronicles a playful setup where a Steam machine is connected via a 50-foot HDMI link. It offers practical takeaways for hobbyists about approaching extreme cable runs and alternative streaming options.
items.summary_zh: 作者以玩味的口吻记录用一条50英尺HDMI线搭建Steam机的尝试，聚焦信号损耗与延迟等现实问题。文章给出对极限距离布线的实际要点，以及对爱好者的替代方案与实现注意事项。

items.title_en: Data centers trigger voter backlash
items.title_zh: 数据中心引发选民反对
items.summary_en: Communities are voicing concerns as data centers draw criticism for electricity consumption and local environmental impact. The story outlines the voter pushback and signals potential policy changes affecting data-center siting and incentives.
items.summary_zh: 由于数据中心的用电和对本地环境的影响，部分选民对数据基础设施扩展表示反对。报道梳理了社区的担忧和可能的政策应对，强调在数据中心选址与激励政策方面的变化可能性。

items.title_en: Wikipedia Workers in Britain set global first by seeking union recognition
items.title_zh: 英国维基百科员工成为全球首例寻求工会承认
items.summary_en: British Wikipedia staff seek union recognition, marking a first within the Wikimedia ecosystem and potentially shaping labor organizing across volunteer-driven projects. The move underscores tensions between paid labor and community governance in collaborative platforms.
items.summary_zh: 英国维基百科员工寻求工会承认，成为维基媒体生态中的全球首例，可能影响依赖志愿者的跨国协作项目的劳动组织与治理格局。

items.title_en: 75% More Pedestrians Have Been Killed Since 2009. Giant Trucks and SUVs Are Why
items.title_zh: 自2009年以来行人死亡率上升 75%，巨型卡车和 SUV 是原因
items.summary_en: A safety analysis finds pedestrian fatalities up 75% since 2009, with the surge largely tied to the growth of large trucks and SUVs on roads. The trend underscores debates over vehicle design, urban infrastructure, and safety tech that could mitigate risks for vulnerable road users.
items.summary_zh: 一项安全分析发现自 2009 年以来行人死亡率上升了 75%，主要与道路上大型卡车和 SUV 的增多有关。这一趋势推动了关于车辆设计、城市基础设施和可提升脆弱行人安全的技术的讨论与政策辩论。

items.title_en: Show HN: Teach your kids perfect pitch
items.title_zh: Show HN：教你的孩子培养完美音准
items.summary_en: Show HN presents bsharp, a method to teach kids perfect pitch. The project includes exercises and progress tracking targeted at young musicians.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍的 bsharp 项目提供一套教孩子训练绝对音感的方法，包含练习与进度跟踪，面向青少年音乐学习者。

items.title_en: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
items.title_zh: Qwen-AgentWorld：面向通用代理的语言世界模型
items.summary_en: The paper proposes Qwen-AgentWorld, a language-powered world model framework for general agents that can reason and act across domains. By integrating natural language with environmental modeling, it aims to advance autonomous AI capable of versatile, cross-domain tasks.
items.summary_zh: 论文提出 Qwen-AgentWorld，一种以语言驱动的通用代理世界模型框架，支持跨领域的推理与行动。通过把自然语言与环境建模结合，旨在推动具备跨域能力的自主 AI。

items.title_en: Japanese symbols that speak without words
items.title_zh: 无需语言也能表达意义的日本符号
items.summary_en: The piece surveys Japanese symbols that convey meaning without words—kanji, kana, and visual iconography—and examines how typography and cultural context shape interpretation for design.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理日本符号在不依赖语言的情况下传达意义的方式——包括汉字、假名与视觉符号学——以及设计师能从中学到的表达技巧。讨论文化语境如何影响解读，并将这些信号应用于 UI/UX 与品牌设计。

items.title_en: Anthropic updates their terms to verify age or identity
items.title_zh: Anthropic 更新条款，需验证年龄或身份
items.summary_en: Anthropic updates its terms to require age or identity verification for use of its AI services. The move raises privacy and accessibility questions, as well as implications for compliance with child-protection and data-ownership rules across jurisdictions.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 更新其使用条款，要求对用户进行年龄或身份验证。这一举措引发隐私与可访问性方面的讨论，并影响在不同司法辖区内对儿童保护与数据所有权等法规的合规性。

items.title_en: A way to exclude sensitive files issue still open for OpenAI Codex
items.title_zh: OpenAI Codex 的排除敏感文件方法仍未解决
items.summary_en: An open issue around how to exclude sensitive files from Codex training or generation remains unresolved. The discussion highlights ongoing data governance and privacy challenges in deploying code-generating AI, where guarding private or proprietary content is critical.
items.summary_zh: 关于如何从 Codex 的训练或输出中排除敏感文件的讨论仍未有定论，尚处于未解决状态。此议题凸显了代码生成模型在数据治理和隐私保护方面的持续挑战，以及对私有或机密内容的防护需求。

items.title_en: (How to Write a (Lisp) Interpreter (In Python)) (2010)
items.title_zh: 用 Python 编写 Lisp 解释器（如何实现）
items.summary_en: This classic tutorial shows how to build a Lisp interpreter in Python, from tokenization to evaluation. It reveals core concepts like environments, recursion, and evaluation in a compact, approachable example.
items.summary_zh: 这篇经典教程展示了如何用 Python 构建一个 Lisp 解释器，从词法分析到求值的完整实现。通过简洁的示例，揭示环境、递归与求值等解释器核心理念，便于入门学习。

items.title_en: Linux on Older Hardware: The Complete Revival Guide
items.title_zh: 旧硬件上运行 Linux 的完整复兴指南
items.summary_en: A practical guide to reviving aging PCs with Linux, covering lightweight distributions, driver compatibility, and performance tips. By breathing new life into old hardware, the guide underscores how Linux can extend device lifespans and curb e-waste, even on machines with limited specs.
items.summary_zh: 提供一份实用指南，教你用 Linuxrevive 旧PC：从选择轻量级发行版、驱动兼容到性能优化。通过延长设备寿命和减少电子垃圾，文章强调在硬件规格有限的情况下依然可以获得可用的体验，并给出可行的注意事项。

items.title_en: Don't verify email addresses by sending spam to them
items.title_zh: 不要通过向邮箱发送垃圾邮件来验证地址
items.summary_en: The post argues against email verification methods that rely on blasting spam to addresses. It advocates safer alternatives like confirmed opt-in, invite-based verification, or leveraging trusted channels to balance security with deliverability and user privacy.
items.summary_zh: 文中反对通过向未核实的邮箱发送垃圾邮件来验证地址的做法，提倡使用确认订阅、受邀验证或信任渠道等更安全、兼顾可投递性与隐私的验证方式。

items.title_en: Un-0: Generating Images with Coupled Oscillators
items.title_zh: Un-0：用耦合振荡器生成图像
items.summary_en: A hardware-oriented approach to image generation using coupled oscillators challenges the dominance of neural nets and diffusion models. The project showcases how physical dynamics can produce visuals, offering a potential path to efficient, low-latency generators and new hardware-software co-design opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 通过耦合振荡器的物理动态来生成图像，挑战了神经网络和扩散模型的主导地位。该方法展示了利用物理系统产生图像的可能性，为实现低延迟、节能的生成方法以及软硬件协同设计打开了新路径。

items.title_en: 'Careless People' author claims Meta surveilled her for 12mos to enforce silence
items.title_zh: 《Careless People》作者称 Meta 连续监控她12个月以逼其保持沉默
items.summary_en: Careless People author Wynn Williams alleges Meta surveilled her for 12 months to enforce a silence order. The claim highlights how large platforms can monitor public figures during litigation, raising privacy and freedom-of-expression concerns for creators.
items.summary_zh: 《Careless People》作者 Wynn Williams 指控 Meta 在12个月内对她进行监控，以强制保持沉默。此事凸显大型平台在诉讼期间对发言者的监控带来的隐私与言论自由担忧，可能影响创作者权利及网络言论环境。

items.title_en: The disappearance of Japan's animators
items.title_zh: 日本动画师的消失
items.summary_en: The Economist reports a troubling exodus of Japan's animators driven by low pay, long hours, and outsourcing pressures. The piece maps how talent drain threatens production pace, quality, and the future of domestic animation.
items.summary_zh: 《经济学人》报道日本动画师大量流失，原因包括低薪、长工时和外包压力。文章分析了人才外流对产出速度、质量以及日本动漫产业未来的影响。

items.title_en: Ask for no, don't ask for yes (2022)
items.title_zh: 先问不要，再问要不要（2022）
items.summary_en: Introduces a negotiation tactic: asking for a 'no' can reduce anxiety and yield clearer commitments. The piece offers practical tips for framing requests and handling responses in professional settings.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了一种谈判技巧：先让对方说“不”可以降低心理防备并促成更清晰的承诺。文中给出在专业情境中提出请求、处理回应的实用建议。

items.title_en: Show HN: Decomp Academy – Learn to decompile GameCube games into matching C
items.title_zh: Show HN：Decomp Academy——将 GameCube 游戏反编译为匹配的 C 代码
items.summary_en: Decomp Academy teaches how to decompile GameCube binaries back to C, offering tooling and tutorials for reverse-engineering projects. It underscores the growing interest in software archaeology and open-source decomp workflows.
items.summary_zh: Decomp Academy 教你把 GameCube 二进制反编译回 C 语言，提供工具与教程。展示了软件考古学的日益活跃，以及对开源反编译工作流的兴趣。

items.title_en: The unbearable cheapness of open weight models
items.title_zh: 开源权重模型的难以承受的便宜
items.summary_en: The Unbearable Cheapness of Open Weight Models argues that while open-weight LLMs dramatically reduce runtime API costs and vendor lock-in, there are hidden costs in compute, energy, governance, and safety. Open weights enable experimentation but shift responsibility to maintain and secure models.
items.summary_zh: 《开源权重模型的难以承受的便宜》指出，开源权重模型虽然显著降低运行成本和对供应商的依赖，但也带来计算、能耗、治理与安全等隐性成本。开放权重促成更多实验，却把维护与安全责任转移到用户端。

items.title_en: I built a GPU back end for Emacs
items.title_zh: 我为 Emacs 构建了基于 GPU 的后端
items.summary_en: A developer built a GPU-backed backend for Emacs to accelerate editing and Lisp evaluation workloads, demonstrating how editors can leverage GPUs for performance.
items.summary_zh: 开发者为 Emacs 构建了一个基于 GPU 的后端，意在提升编辑器的性能，尤其是在 Lisp 运算和渲染等任务上。

items.title_en: Boffin claims Microsoft’s “quantum leap” is invalid due to “basic Python errors”
items.title_zh: 研究员称微软的‘量子跃迁’无效，原因是“基本Python错误”
items.summary_en: A researcher argues that Microsoft’s quantum computing claims don’t hold up due to basic Python errors in demonstrations. The critique adds noise to corporate hype around quantum progress and stresses the need for reproducible evidence in cutting-edge research.
items.summary_zh: 一位研究者称微软在量子计算方面的说法因演示中的基本Python错误而站不住脚。这一质疑加剧了对量子技术企业宣称的质疑，强调在前沿研究中需要可重复的证据。

items.title_en: Usbliter8: an A12/A13 SecureROM Exploit
items.title_zh: Usbliter8：面向 A12/A13 SecureROM 的漏洞利用
items.summary_en: Usbliter8 exposes a SecureROM exploit affecting A12/A13 devices, illustrating the ongoing cat-and-mouse in iPhone security. The writeup highlights the risk of secure boot circumvention, the need for firmware defenses, and the potential impact if such exploits are weaponized.
items.summary_zh: Usbliter8 揭示影响 A12/A13 SecureROM 的漏洞利用，展示对安全启动的突破。本文强调此类漏洞带来的风险、对固件防御的需求，以及若被滥用可能产生的影响。

items.title_en: Bohemia Interactive: Cold War Assault Remastered Source Code on GitHub
items.title_zh: Bohemia Interactive：Cold War Assault Remastered 源代码在 GitHub 开源
items.summary_en: Bohemia Interactive released the Cold War Assault Remastered source code on GitHub, inviting modders and researchers to examine the engine and tools. This mirrors a broader trend of open-sourcing legacy game code to spur experimentation, while raising questions about licensing and attribution.
items.summary_zh: Bohemia Interactive 将 Cold War Assault Remastered 的源代码发布到 GitHub，供社区研究引擎与工具。此举反映了开源遗留游戏代码以推动探索的趋势，同时也引发版权与署名方面的讨论。

items.title_en: Michigan spent $1.8B and only created 602 jobs
items.title_zh: 密歇根花费18亿美元却仅创造602个就业岗位
items.summary_en: State spending awarded a large financing package yet produced only a fraction of promised jobs, prompting questions about program design, effectiveness, and ROI. The case underscores how incentives must be paired with measurable impact and transparent reporting.
items.summary_zh: 该州投入巨额资金却只实现了承诺就业岗位的一小部分，引发对项目设计、有效性和投资回报率的质疑。案例强调在激励政策中需要可衡量的影响和透明的结果报告。

items.title_en: Show HN: Monolisa v3 – a typeface for developers and creatives
items.title_zh: Show HN：Monolisa v3 — 面向开发者与创意工作者的字体
items.summary_en: Show HN: Monolisa v3 – a typeface for developers and creatives introduces a new font optimized for code editors and design work. It highlights typography choices tailored to readability and aesthetics for tech users.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Monolisa v3——为开发者与创意工作者设计的新字体，强调在代码编辑与设计工作中的可读性与美感的字体选择。

items.title_en: Political bias in AI: Where the AI models stand
items.title_zh: AI 政治偏见：模型现状分析
items.summary_en: An assessment of political bias in AI models, evaluating where leading systems stand on ideological neutrality, how bias manifests in outputs, and what techniques engineers are deploying to mitigate it. The piece emphasizes that bias is not solved and ongoing auditing is essential.
items.summary_zh: 对 AI 模型中的政治偏见进行评估，判断主流系统在意识形态中立性、输出偏见的表现以及工程师正在采用的缓解手段。文章强调偏见并非已被消除，持续审计和透明度至关重要。

items.title_en: The Boeing 747 begins its final descent
items.title_zh: 波音 747 正进入最终退役阶段
items.summary_en: The Boeing 747, long the icon of global air travel, is nearing retirement as fleets and routes shift to more efficient jets. The piece traces the 747's engineering legacy, economic drivers of its sunset, and the challenges of maintaining aging aircraft while demand evolves.
items.summary_zh: 作为全球航空旅行的象征，波音 747 即将退役，全球航线与机队的更新推动其退出市场。文章回顾了 747 在工程与全球经济中的影响，以及在需求和维护成本变化背景下退役所面临的挑战。

items.title_en: What Ozempic does to the gut-brain axis
items.title_zh: 奥泽匹克对肠-脑轴的影响
items.summary_en: The article explains how Ozempic and related GLP-1 drugs influence gut-brain signaling, appetite, and possibly mood, with implications for long-term health and metabolic outcomes. It clarifies mechanisms and cautions about variability across individuals.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍 Ozempic 等 GLP-1 药物如何影响肠-脑轴、食欲和情绪等潜在机制，并讨论长期健康影响与个体差异。

items.title_en: An oral history of Bank Python (2021)
items.title_zh: Bank Python 的口述史（2021）
items.summary_en: An oral history revisits Bank Python from 2021, detailing the people, decisions, and engineering challenges behind the project and its aftermath. The piece offers lessons for open-source maintainers, fintech tooling, and product decisions under pressure.
items.summary_zh: 对 2021 年 Bank Python 的口述史回顾，讲述参与者、关键决策与工程挑战及其后果，为开源维护者、金融科技工具与高压环境下的产品决策提供经验教训。

items.title_en: Polymarket's viral videos showed people winning big, but the bets were fake
items.title_zh: Polymarket 的病毒视频显示有人赢大钱，但投注为假
items.summary_en: Polymarket's viral videos suggested large winnings, but investigators found that the underlying bets were fake, pointing to deceptive marketing and potential fraud. The incident intensifies scrutiny of prediction markets and underscores the need for better transparency and oversight in tokenized betting platforms.
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 的病毒式视频显示有人获得巨额收益，然而调查发现相关赌注为虚假，指向误导性营销与可能的欺诈。这一事件加剧了对预测市场的监管关注，并凸显对代币化赌注平台透明度与监管的需求。

items.title_en: WordStar: A Writer's Word Processor (1996)
items.title_zh: WordStar：一位作家的文字处理器（1996）
items.summary_en: WordStar was a pioneering, keyboard-centric word processor that shaped early writing workflows. This retrospective revisits its design choices, user interface quirks, and influence on later editors and author workflows, contrasting it with modern editors and markup tools.
items.summary_zh: WordStar 是一款开创性的、以键盘为中心的文字处理器，深刻影响了早期写作工作流。回顾其设计选择、界面特征及对后续编辑器与作者工作流的影响，并与现代编辑器和标记工具进行对比。

items.title_en: OpenAI leans toward waiting until next year for IPO
items.title_zh: OpenAI 倾向推迟至明年上市
items.summary_en: OpenAI is reportedly postponing its IPO to next year, signaling a cautious approach to going public as it weighs governance, regulatory readiness, and market conditions. The decision reflects the complex path for AI-focused firms seeking public markets.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，OpenAI 计划将上市时间推迟到明年，权衡治理、监管就绪与市场条件，显现出对面向公开市场的谨慎策略。此举反映了专注于 AI 的公司在进入公开市场时面临的复杂路径。

items.title_en: Who owns your ATProto identity?
items.title_zh: 谁拥有你的 ATProto 身份？
items.summary_en: The post argues that ownership of ATProto identities is not straightforward and elusive for users. It examines implications for privacy, portability, and platform control, urging readers to consider where their digital identity truly resides.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出 ATProto 身份的拥有权并非对用户而言清晰易定，涉及隐私、可移植性与平台控制等问题。呼吁读者关注数字身份的实际掌控权与去中心化可能性。

items.title_en: Medical students are using popular research tool to pump out misleading studies
items.title_zh: 医学生利用热门研究工具炮制误导性研究
items.summary_en: Medical students are allegedly using a popular research tool to generate misleading studies, exposing vulnerabilities in how easily AI-assisted or automated tools can distort medical literature. The incident underscores the need for stronger verification, education, and safeguards in research workflows.
items.summary_zh: 据称医学生在流行的研究工具中快速生成误导性研究，暴露了 AI 辅助工具对医学文献造成扭曲的风险。此事强调需要加强核查、教育与研究工作流中的安全防护。

items.title_en: Memory Safe Inline Assembly
items.title_zh: 内存安全的内联汇编
items.summary_en: Explores a path to memory-safe inline assembly, proposing language or tooling that preserves low-level performance while preventing common memory bugs. Key ideas include safe interfaces, formal verification, and guarding against buffer overruns.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在保持低级别性能的同时实现内存安全的内联汇编路径，提出了可保证内存安全的语言或工具。核心思路包括安全接口、形式化验证，以及防止缓冲区溢出等常见漏洞。

items.title_en: Post-Mythos Cybersecurity: Keep calm and carry on
items.title_zh: 后神话时代的网络安全：保持冷静，继续前行
items.summary_en: Post-mythos cybersecurity argues for pragmatic, resilient security practices over alarmist narratives. It emphasizes steady risk management, observable controls, and calm incident response in a landscape of evolving threats.
items.summary_zh: 在持续演变的威胁环境中，后神话时代的网络安全倡导务实、具韧性的安全做法，强调稳健的风险管理、可观测的控制以及冷静的事件响应。

items.title_en: PowerFox Browser
items.title_zh: PowerFox 浏览器
items.summary_en: PowerFox is a privacy-first browser aiming for speed and control, with configurable protections and performance optimizations. It targets power users who want tighter performance and customization without sacrificing privacy.
items.summary_zh: PowerFox 浏览器定位为隐私优先、追求高效与可控性，内置可配置的保护机制和性能优化，面向希望在不牺牲隐私的前提下获得更高性能的高级用户。

items.title_en: Minecraft: Java Edition 26.2, the first version with Vulkan 1.2
items.title_zh: Minecraft Java 版26.2：首个支持 Vulkan 1.2 的版本
items.summary_en: Java Edition 26.2 adds Vulkan 1.2 support, enabling better GPU acceleration, reduced CPU bottlenecks, and improved cross-platform performance. The change signals continued graphics updates and performance improvements in a long-running title.
items.summary_zh: Java 版 26.2 首次加入 Vulkan 1.2 支持，提升 GPU 加速、减轻 CPU 瓶颈并改善跨平台性能。这一更新表明这款长期运行的游戏仍在持续推进图形与性能优化。

items.title_en: The US Army Issued Ocarinas to Soldiers in World War II
items.title_zh: 二战期间美军向士兵发放陶笛
items.summary_en: During WWII, the U.S. Army distributed inexpensive ocarinas to soldiers, using music to boost morale, signal in the field, or reinforce drills. The article shows how a simple instrument found practical wartime uses beyond entertainment.
items.summary_zh: 二战时期美军向士兵发放便宜的陶笛，用音乐提振士气、进行野战信号传递以及加强训练。文章展示了这样一个简单乐器在战时的实际应用与价值。

items.title_en: Dirty Little Zine – a tool for making an 8 page printable Zine
items.title_zh: Dirty Little Zine：制作 8 页可打印 Zine 的工具
items.summary_en: Dirty Little Zine provides a tool to generate an 8-page printable zine, lowering the barrier for DIY publishing. It scratches the edge between maker culture and accessible layout tooling, enabling quick, offline distribution.
items.summary_zh: Dirty Little Zine 提供一个生成 8 页可打印 zine 的工具，降低自出版的门槛。它将创客文化与易用的排版工具结合，便于快速离线分发。

items.title_en: Feds Killed Polestar and Spared Volvo
items.title_zh: 联邦监管击垮 Polestar，放过沃尔沃，这应让你感到不安
items.summary_en: The piece argues federal actions targeted Polestar while sparing Volvo, a dynamic that could upend trust in regulatory consistency for tech-forward automakers. It warns that uneven enforcement may stifle competition and innovation.
items.summary_zh: 文章称联邦监管让 Polestar 失败、却对沃尔沃网开一面，这种差异化执法让人对科技/汽车领域的监管一致性产生担忧。

items.title_en: Long Wave radio era set to end with switch-off
items.title_zh: 长波广播时代将因关停而结束
items.summary_en: The world's oldest long‑wave service is being shut down, signaling the end of an era in broadcast infrastructure. The switch-off reflects ongoing cost-cutting and modernization, with listeners urged to update to digital or alternative bands, reshaping how rural and regional audiences stay informed.
items.summary_zh: 全球最老的长波广播服务即将被切断，标志着这一代广播基础设施的告别。此举反映了成本节约与数字化升级的趋势，听众可能需要转向数字广播或其他频段获取信息，农村和地区性收听也将受影响。

items.title_en: Japanese verb conjugation the simple hard way
items.title_zh: 日语动词变形：简单而难的方式
items.summary_en: Offers a practical route to mastering Japanese verb conjugations by focusing on patterns and rules rather than rote memorization of dozens of forms. The approach aims to make irregulars approachable and give learners a working framework.
items.summary_zh: 提供一种实用的方法来掌握日语动词变形，强调模式和规则，而非死记硬背大量形式。该方法旨在让不规则变化更易于掌握，并给学习者一个可落地的框架。

items.title_en: Fossil Fuels Are 40% of Freight Shipping Tonnage, but Half Its Fuel Use
items.title_zh: 化石燃料占货运吨位的40%，却占用一半燃料消耗
items.summary_en: A new analysis shows fossil fuels represent about 40% of freight tonnage but account for roughly half the energy use, underscoring efficiency gains and decarbonization opportunities in shipping. The finding suggests focusing on vessel design, routes, and energy mix to cut emissions.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示化石燃料约占货运吨位的40%，却约占一半的能源消耗，凸显航运业在减排方面的潜在改进点。应聚焦船舶设计、航线优化和能源结构以降低排放。

items.title_en: How I play video games with spinal muscular atrophy
items.title_zh: 我在脊髓性肌萎缩症下玩电子游戏的方法
items.summary_en: An individual with spinal muscular atrophy explains how they actually play video games today, detailing assistive technologies, adaptive controllers, and daily setup. The account highlights accessible-gaming tools and broader implications for inclusive design.
items.summary_zh: 一位患有脊髓性肌萎缩症的人分享了自己实际的游戏玩法，介绍了辅助技术、适应性控制器以及日常使用的设备。此文凸显了无障碍游戏工具的重要性以及对包容性设计的启示。

items.title_en: NSF slashes research programs to support new tech initiative, insiders say
items.title_zh: NSF 削减研究项目以支持新技术倡议，内部人士称
items.summary_en: The NSF is reportedly slashing some research programs to fund a new tech initiative, with insiders noting concerns about how this shift will affect foundational research. The move could realign funding priorities and ripple through academia and industry.
items.summary_zh: 据称 NSF 正削减部分研究项目以资助一项新技术倡议，内部人士对这次调整对基础研究的影响表达担忧。此举可能改变资金优先级，并对学术界与产业生态产生连锁效应。

items.title_en: A deadly fungus that can infect cats and people is spreading
items.title_zh: 一种能感染猫和人类的致命真菌正在传播
items.summary_en: A deadly fungus capable of infecting both cats and people is spreading, raising concerns about zoonotic transmission and treatment options. The piece underscores the importance of surveillance, veterinary health, and cross-species pathogen awareness.
items.summary_zh: 一种能够同时感染猫和人类的致命真菌正在蔓延，引发对人畜共患病传播和治疗选择的担忧。文章强调监测、兽医卫生和跨物种病原体意识的重要性。

items.title_en: Trains halted across Germany because of communication system problem
items.title_zh: 德国因通信系统故障导致全国铁路停运
items.summary_en: A nationwide communication-system outage halted trains across Germany, demonstrating how rail operations depend on centralized tech. Operators rerouted services and workers investigate the root cause, with potential safety and timetable ripple effects.
items.summary_zh: 德国因通信系统故障导致全国铁路停运，暴露了铁路运营对集中式通信的高度依赖。运营方正在调整线路、处理延误，并调查根本原因，事件对安全与时刻表造成连锁影响。

items.title_en: EU Open Sources Ten-Year Network Development Planning Tools
items.title_zh: 欧盟开源十年电网发展规划工具
items.summary_en: Europe has open-sourced a suite of ten-year energy network planning tools to model and optimize future grids. By making the tools open, researchers, policymakers, and industry players can collaborate, validate scenarios, and accelerate grid modernization toward decarbonization while improving reliability.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟开源了一套十年期的电网发展规划工具，用于建模与优化未来的能源网络。通过开源，研究者、政策制定者和产业参与者可以协作、验证情景，并推进电网现代化以实现去碳目标并提升可靠性。

items.title_en: San Diego photologs from the 1970s
items.title_zh: 1970年代圣地亚哥摄影日志
items.summary_en: A collection of San Diego photo logs from the 1970s offers a visual snapshot of urban life during that era. The archive showcases street scenes and public space usage, providing historical context for city development and cultural shifts.
items.summary_zh: 一组来自1970年代的圣地亚哥摄影日志以影像记录了当时的城市生活，展现街景、公共空间的使用以及城市发展与文化变迁的历史脉络。

items.title_en: The Low-Tech AI of Elden Ring
items.title_zh: 《艾尔登法环》的低技术 AI
items.summary_en: The Elden Ring piece argues that its AI uses surprisingly simple rules to deliver believable enemies, showing how low-complexity AI can still produce compelling gameplay at scale.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出《艾尔登法环》中的 AI 实现其实相对简单，却能提供逼真的对手行为，显示低复杂度 AI 也能在大规模游戏中带来出色的玩法体验。

items.title_en: Zombie unicorns are haunting Silicon Valley
items.title_zh: 僵尸独角兽正在困扰硅谷
items.summary_en: Zombie unicorns refer to startups that retain billion-dollar valuations while burning cash and showing weak fundamentals, propped up by a late-stage funding appetite. The piece argues this dynamic distorts capital markets and may force a reckoning in Silicon Valley as funding conditions tighten.
items.summary_zh: 所谓‘僵尸独角兽’指在资金持续支撑下仍维持十亿美元级估值、但基本面薄弱的初创企业。此现象扭曲资本市场，随着融资环境收紧，硅谷可能面临重新定价与投资谨慎的局面。

items.title_en: Anatomy of a Failed (Nation-State?) Attack
items.title_zh: 对一起备受关注的疑似国家级攻击进行了分解，揭示攻击者的手段与失误以及为何未能成功
items.summary_en: Dissects a high-profile attack widely described as a nation-state operation, detailing the missteps and why the breach failed. The analysis emphasizes defensive lessons in threat modeling, credential hygiene, and incident response that defenders can apply.
items.summary_zh: 对一起备受关注的疑似国家级攻击进行了分解，揭示攻击者的手段与失误以及为何未能成功。分析强调防守方在威胁建模、凭证安全、事件响应等方面的可操作教训。

items.title_en: Chevron signs 20-year power agreement with Microsoft for West Texas data center
items.title_zh: Chevron 与微软签订 West Texas 数据中心20年用电协议
items.summary_en: Chevron signs a 20-year power purchase agreement with Microsoft to power a West Texas data center, signaling corporate demand for clean energy and long-term reliability. The deal highlights how large buyers coordinate with utilities to decarbonize and stabilize energy costs for cloud infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 雪佛龙与微软签署在西德克萨斯州数据中心的20年购电协议，显示企业对清洁能源与长期供电可靠性的需求。此交易体现大型买家如何与公用事业方协作，以实现云基础设施的低碳化与成本稳定。

items.title_en: What Is a Nomogram and Why Would It Interest Me?
items.title_zh: 什么是列线图（Nomogram）以及它为何重要？
items.summary_en: Nomograms are visual calculators that map a statistical model to a simple ruler, making predictions easier to interpret. The linked guide shows how to construct them in Python and why they remain useful for explainable AI and clinical decision support.
items.summary_zh: 列线图是一种将统计模型转化为直观尺尺的可视化工具，便于理解预测结果。指南介绍如何用 Python 构建列线图，以及它在可解释 AI 与临床决策支持中的应用价值。

items.title_en: US Govt to individually approve who gets GPT 5.6
items.title_zh: 美国政府对 GPT-5.6 实施逐人审批
items.summary_en: Government proposes per-user approval for access to GPT-5.6, effectively turning access control into a license-per-person regime. The policy raises concerns about innovation, inclusivity, and safety governance in next-gen AI models.
items.summary_zh: 政府拟对 GPT-5.6 的使用实行逐人审批，实际变成按人许可的制度。这一政策引发对创新、包容性与未来 AI 模型安全治理的担忧。

items.title_en: Deno 2.9
items.title_zh: Deno 2.9 发布
items.summary_en: Deno 2.9 ships with performance improvements, bug fixes, and developer-focused enhancements; highlights include new APIs and improved startup times, reinforcing Deno’s stance as a secure, modern runtime for JavaScript and TypeScript.
items.summary_zh: Deno 2.9 发布，带来性能改进、漏洞修复和面向开发者的增强，包含新的 API 和更快的启动时间，巩固了 Deno 作为安全、现代 JavaScript/TypeScript 运行时的地位。

items.title_en: DLL that was not present in memory despite not being formally unloaded
items.title_zh: 未正式卸载却不在内存中的 DLL
items.summary_en: A Windows debugging note discusses a DLL that wasn't present in memory even though the loader hadn't formally unloaded it, revealing quirks in module management. It highlights nuances between loaded modules and actual memory residency useful for debugging.
items.summary_zh: 这篇微软技术博客记录了一个 DLL 即使未被正式卸载，内存中却并不存在的情况，揭示了模块管理中的细微差别。此现象对调试、内存映射和性能分析具有参考价值。

items.title_en: Tokenmaxxing is dead, long live tokenmaxxing
items.title_zh: Tokenmaxxing 已死，Tokenmaxxing 将长存
items.summary_en: Tokenmaxxing has seen a pivot: the old form may be fading, but the core mindset remains—optimizing prompts, tool use, and token budgets will continue under new guises as models and pricing evolve. The post argues that while the practice changes, the incentives to maximize efficiency persist.
items.summary_zh: 该文认为“Tokenmaxxing”的旧形式或已衰退，但核心思维仍在：在新模型与定价结构下，优化提示、工具使用和 token 使用的动机将以新的形式继续存在。

items.title_en: Job application asked for my SAT scores
items.title_zh: 求职申请竟然要我的 SAT 成绩
items.summary_en: A job application asked for SAT scores, prompting debate on whether such data is relevant or appropriate for employment. It underscores the broader push for privacy-respecting, skills-based hiring.
items.summary_zh: 一份求职申请竟要求提供 SAT 成绩，引发关于隐私和公平招聘的讨论。标准化考试成绩并非评估工作能力的可靠依据，收集这类信息可能带来歧视风险，推动以技能为基础的招聘。

items.title_en: Underarm bowling incident of 1981
items.title_zh: 1981 年的下臂投球事件
items.summary_en: The 1981 underarm bowling incident remains a watershed moment in cricket diplomacy: a contrived ball delivered underarm to prevent a win sparked global outrage and led to stronger sportsmanship norms. It also pushed changes in rules and etiquette around fair play.
items.summary_zh: 1981 年的新西兰下臂投球事件成为板球外交史上的分水岭。为避免对手获胜而以下臂投球，激起全球愤慨并推动了对公平竞赛规范和裁判准则的反馈与修订。

items.title_en: Finding the best dog treat with statistics
items.title_zh: 用统计找出最佳狗零食
items.summary_en: A data-driven look at evaluating dog treats, illustrating how experimental design, sample size, and basic stats can quantify palatability and nutritional trade-offs. The piece translates a pet-care topic into a mini stats tutorial with practical takeaways.
items.summary_zh: 以数据驱动的方法评估狗狗零食，展示了如何通过实验设计、样本量和基本统计量来量化口味和营养之间的权衡。这一案例把宠物护理问题变成了可落地的统计小教程。

items.title_en: Show HN: Criterion Closet as a website – pull any of 1,247 films off the shelf
items.title_zh: Show HN：Criterion Closet 网站——一键选取 1,247 部影片
items.summary_en: Show HN project: Criterion Closet is a website that lets users pull any of 1,247 Criterion Collection films off the shelf, providing a searchable interface to a curated catalog.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 项目：Criterion Closet 是一个网站，用户可以从包含 1,247 部 Criterion 影库的书架中检索并获取影片，提供对精选目录的可搜索界面。

items.title_en: Beer CSS – Build material design in record time
items.title_zh: Beer CSS：用最短时间构建 Material Design 界面
items.summary_en: Beer CSS is a minimal design system designed to speed up building Material Design UIs. It lowers boilerplate and provides sane defaults, enabling rapid prototyping with consistent visuals.
items.summary_zh: Beer CSS 是一个极简设计系统，能在极短时间内搭建 Material Design 风格的界面。它减少样式代码，提供合理默认值，帮助快速原型设计并确保视觉一致性。

items.title_en: British Columbia, Time Zones, and Postgres
items.title_zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省的时区变更与 PostgreSQL
items.summary_en: PostgreSQL uses the IANA tz database to handle time zone rules, including changes in British Columbia. The piece stresses keeping tzdata up to date and using proper time zone handling (TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE) to avoid DST-related surprises.
items.summary_zh: PostgreSQL 通过 IANA tz 数据库处理时区规则，包括不列颠哥伦比亚省的最新时区调整。文章强调保持 tzdata 更新，并正确使用带时区的时间字段，以避免夏令时等变更带来的问题。

items.title_en: International investment and local rules push prices up faster than supply
items.title_zh: 国际投资与地方规则让房价上涨快于供应
items.summary_en: Foreign investment and local regulation can push housing prices up faster than new supply, according to the study. The findings suggest capital flows and zoning constraints magnify affordability challenges, highlighting policy gaps that can trap price growth.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明，国际投资与地方监管共同推动房价上涨速度超过新房供应的增速。资金流动和土地使用限制叠加放大了可负担性问题，凸显相关政策缺口。

items.title_en: How Many Elementary Particles Are There, Really?
items.title_zh: 真正有多少基本粒子？
items.summary_en: Physicists debate what counts as an elementary particle, given scale and theoretical definitions. The piece surveys how definitions shift with new experiments and models, and what that means for our understanding of the fundamental building blocks.
items.summary_zh: 物理学家在基本粒子定义上存在分歧，是否真的“基本”取决于能量尺度与理论框架。文章梳理定义、实验约束，以及在前沿领域如何将复合态模糊化为基本自由度。

items.title_en: Memory crisis is getting so bad that even retro RAM prices are going to the Moon
items.title_zh: 记忆危机推动复古 RAM 价格上涨
items.summary_en: A memory shortage is driving up prices for both cutting-edge DRAM and retro RAM as demand outpaces supply.
items.summary_zh: 内存短缺推动了前沿 DRAM 以及复古 RAM 的价格上涨，需求超过供应。文章评估对爱好者、数据中心等行业的影响，以及为何遗留内存的价格上涨速度可能高于预期。

items.title_en: Daisugi, the Japanese technique of growing trees out of other trees (2020)
items.title_zh: 大杉术：日本通过让树从其他树上长出新树的做法（2020）
items.summary_en: Daisugi is a Japanese forestry technique where live trees are grown from the branches of other trees to harvest straight timber without cutting down the parent. It represents an early example of sustainable forestry and clever resource management.
items.summary_zh: 大杉术是日本的一种林业技术，通过让活树从其他树的枝干上生长出新树，从而在不砍伐母树的情况下获取笔直木材。这一做法是可持续林业与资源管理的早期典范。

items.title_en: ytr: YouTube Radio for Emacs
items.title_zh: ytr：供 Emacs 使用的 YouTube Radio
items.summary_en: ytr implements a lightweight YouTube radio experience inside Emacs, enabling keyboard-driven browsing and playback of YouTube audio. For power users, it's an example of integrating modern streaming services into a programmable editor, though reliability and licensing caveats apply.
items.summary_zh: ytr 在 Emacs 中实现了一个轻量的 YouTube Radio 体验，便于在编辑器内通过键盘浏览并播放 YouTube 音频。对于爱好者来说，这是将现代流媒体服务与可编程编辑器结合的有趣案例，但在可靠性和授权方面存在潜在约束。

items.title_en: The case against geometric algebra (2024)
items.title_zh: 反对几何代数的论证（2024）
items.summary_en: A critical take on geometric algebra argues it offers limited practical advantages over conventional vector calculus and can complicate understanding. The piece weighs its claimed unifying power against real-world adoption in physics and engineering.
items.summary_zh: 对几何代数的质疑指出，它在实际应用中相较传统向量微积分并无明显优势，反而可能增加理解难度。文章权衡其所宣称的统一性与在物理和工程领域的实际应用证据。

items.title_en: How H-E-B became Texas' most beloved brand (2024)
items.title_zh: H-E-B 如何成为德州最受喜爱的品牌（2024）
items.summary_en: The piece traces how H-E-B built a deeply rooted Texas brand through customer-first operations, local engagement, and distinctive shopping experiences. The result is a grocery chain that's become a cultural touchstone with fiercely loyal customers and resilient growth.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理了 H-E-B 如何通过以客户为中心的运营、深入的社区参与，以及独特的门店体验，建立起扎根德州的品牌形象，赢得深厚的顾客忠诚与稳健增长。

items.title_en: The National Parks Were Reportedly Told to Stay Silent on Deaths
items.title_zh: 据报道，国家公园被告知对死亡事件保持沉默
items.summary_en: Internal memos reportedly instructed staff to stay silent about deaths, raising questions about transparency in public lands. The episode underscores tensions between crisis communications and public accountability in public lands.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，国家公园内部备忘录要求工作人员对死亡事件保持沉默，对外信息传播受到限制。此事引发对公共土地透明度、危机沟通和问责问题的讨论。

items.title_en: The last Romans are still around
items.title_zh: 最后的罗马人仍在身边
items.summary_en: Remnants of the Roman era continue to influence modern culture, law, and infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 罗马时代的影响仍在现代文化、法律和基础设施中延续。

items.title_en: Show HN: An ASCII 3D Rendering Engine
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个 ASCII 3D 渲染引擎
items.summary_en: An ASCII 3D rendering engine demonstrates a pure CPU pipeline that outputs 3D scenes as ASCII art in real time. It showcases techniques like ray marching or voxel rendering adapted to character grids, offering a playful baseline for terminals and low-res displays. It is a striking example of creative coding that runs without a GPU.
items.summary_zh: 一个纯 CPU 渲染管线的 ASCII 3D 引擎把 3D 场景实时输出为字符画，适合在终端或低分辨率显示上使用。它展示了将光线行进、体素渲染等技术适配到字符网格的实现方式，提供了一个有趣的创意编码基线。

items.title_en: WAL-RUS: a Rust Rewrite of WAL-G for PostgreSQL Backups
items.title_zh: WAL-RUS：PostgreSQL 备份的 WAL-G 的 Rust 重写
items.summary_en: WAL-RUS reimplements WAL-G in Rust to back up PostgreSQL, promising safer memory handling and performance improvements over older runtimes. It's a concrete example of modern language rewrites unlocking reliability in critical operations.
items.summary_zh: WAL-RUS 将 WAL-G 重写为 Rust 实现 PostgreSQL 备份，期待带来更高的安全性和性能优势。此举是用现代语言改写老牌工具以提升可靠性的一个案例。

items.title_en: I rewrote PostHog's SQL parser, 70x faster, while barely looking at the code
items.title_zh: 我在几乎不看代码的情况下把 PostHog 的 SQL 解析器重写，提速 70 倍
items.summary_en: A post describes rewriting PostHog's SQL parser to achieve 70x speedups with minimal code review. The work illustrates how thoughtful parser design and targeted optimizations can unlock outsized performance gains in analytics tooling. It serves as a reminder that small architectural shifts can have large payoffs.
items.summary_zh: 一篇文章描述在几乎不看代码的前提下重写 PostHog 的 SQL 解析器，使其速度提升约 70 倍。此成就展示了解析器设计和算法优化在分析工具链中的巨大潜力，也提醒开发者关注架构层面的长期收益。

items.title_en: Statistics that live in your SQL
items.title_zh: 存在于 SQL 的统计数据
items.summary_en: Kolistat v0.6.0 discusses embedding statistical summaries directly in SQL, enabling faster analytics without moving data into external stores. The approach can improve performance for BI workloads and reduce ETL complexity.
items.summary_zh: Kolistat v0.6.0 讨论将统计信息直接嵌入 SQL，使分析无需将数据移出数据库。该方法有望提升 BI 工作负载的性能并简化 ETL 过程。

items.title_en: Google limits Meta's use of its Gemini AI models
items.title_zh: 谷歌限制 Meta 使用 Gemini AI 模型
items.summary_en: Google is restricting Meta's access to its Gemini AI models, signaling a tightening of intercompany AI model usage. The move underscores tensions over licensing, access control, and who can wield cutting-edge capabilities, shaping collaboration and competition in AI.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌收紧对 Meta 使用 Gemini AI 模型的权限，标志着双方在 AI 模型使用上的控制更严格。此举凸显了许可与访问边界的博弈，或将影响行业内的合作与竞争格局。

items.title_en: Five monitors on a Commodore 128 [video]
items.title_zh: 在 Commodore 128 上实现五屏显示 [视频]
items.summary_en: A retro-computing showcase where a Commodore 128 drives five monitors, pushing hardware hacks and display tiling to the extreme. It highlights enduring hobbyist ingenuity and the quirks of vintage systems.
items.summary_zh: 这段视频展示一台 Commodore 128 驱动五个显示器，凸显极致的硬件改造与显示分割技术，以及对复古系统的持续热情与创造力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Bible as RAG Database
items.title_zh: 圣经作为 RAG 数据库
items.summary_en: Crosscanon presents using the Bible as a Retrieval-Augmented Generation database, exploring how a structured, well-curated text corpus can support informative QA or generative tasks, possibly with privacy and bias considerations.
items.summary_zh: Crosscanon 探讨将圣经作为检索增强生成（RAG）的知识库，研究这一结构化文本如何在问答或生成任务中提供信息，同时关注隐私与偏见等问题。

items.title_en: The AI industry is pouring millions into US elections
items.title_zh: AI 行业向美国大选投入巨资
items.summary_en: AI industry players are funding political influence in U.S. elections through campaigns, think tanks, and lobbying groups, raising concerns about transparency and the potential shaping of policy on AI governance.
items.summary_zh: AI 行业参与者正通过竞选资金、智库和游说团体等渠道在美国大选上投入巨额资金，引发对透明度及 AI 治理政策潜在影响的担忧。

items.title_en: Algorithmic Monocultures in Hiring
items.title_zh: 招聘中的算法单一化问题
items.summary_en: AI-powered hiring tools can embed racial bias and create systemic rejection patterns, risking reduced diversity. The piece calls for auditing, transparency, and human oversight to mitigate harm.
items.summary_zh: AI 招聘工具可能内化并放大种族偏见，导致系统性排斥，危及多样性。文章呼吁对工具进行审计、提高透明度，并保留人类监督以降低伤害。

items.title_en: Show HN: Recall – Local project memory for Claude Code
items.title_zh: Recall：为 Claude Code 提供本地项目记忆
items.summary_en: Recall adds local project memory to Claude Code, enabling the model to reference a developer’s repository context offline for better code understanding and retrieval.
items.summary_zh: Recall 为 Claude Code 增添本地项目记忆，使模型在离线状态下也能引用开发者的代码库上下文，从而提升代码理解与检索能力。

items.title_en: Cyberdecks, going analog, and convivial technology
items.title_zh: 赛博甲板：走向模拟化与宜人科技
items.summary_en: Explores a trend toward analog, offline-friendly cyberdecks and a convivial tech culture that prioritizes privacy and local-first workflows. The piece argues these setups can foster resilience and community in a connected world.
items.summary_zh: 探讨走向模拟化、离线友好型的赛博甲板以及更为友善的技术文化，强调隐私与本地优先工作流的重要性。这种风格的设备被视为在互联世界中提升韧性与社区感的途径。

items.title_en: Linux and Secure Boot certificate expiration (2025)
items.title_zh: Linux 与 Secure Boot 证书在 2025 年到期
items.summary_en: Secure Boot certificates are set to expire in 2025, risking boot failures on systems relying on older shim and Mok certificates. Admins should plan to update bootloaders, re-sign kernels, and validate firmware upgrades before the expiration window hits.
items.summary_zh: 2025 年将到期的 Secure Boot 证书可能导致使用旧 shim 和 MokKey 的系统无法启动。文章建议管理员尽早更新引导链的证书、重新签名内核，并测试固件升级路径。

items.title_en: DHL Set to Transport Goods on New Wind-Powered Cargo Ships
items.title_zh: DHL 将使用风力辅助的货船运输货物
items.summary_en: DHL plans to transport goods on wind-powered cargo ships, signaling a bold step toward decarbonizing logistics. While wind-assisted ships face scalability and energy efficiency questions, this move could push the industry toward greener maritime practices.
items.summary_zh: DHL 将使用以风力辅助的货船运输货物，标志着物流领域向低碳化迈出的大胆一步。尽管风力辅助船在规模化和效率方面仍有挑战，但此举可能推动航运业走向更绿色的未来。

items.title_en: Bipartite Matching Is in NC
items.title_zh: 双部图匹配属于 NC 类
items.summary_en: A breakthrough in complexity theory shows bipartite matching resides in NC, indicating highly parallelizable algorithms for solving this classic problem. The result tightens our understanding of parallel computation limits and could influence practical huge-scale graph processing.
items.summary_zh: 在复杂性理论中取得突破性进展，证明双部图匹配问题属于 NC 类，意味着可并行化程度很高的求解算法。该结果拓展了对并行计算极限的理解，并可能影响大规模图处理的实际应用。

items.title_en: The Commodore Callback 8020 smart flip phone
items.title_zh: Commodore 的 Callback 8020 智能翻盖手机
items.summary_en: Spotlights Commodore's retro-styled 'Callback 8020' flip phone pitched as a digital detox device with modern capabilities. It exemplifies nostalgia-driven hardware that emphasizes simplicity over feature bloat.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 Commodore 推出的复古风格翻盖手机 Callback 8020，定位为数字戒断设备并具备现代功能。体现了以简化为卖点的怀旧硬件趋势及其市场动机。

items.title_en: Excessive nil pointer checks in Go
items.title_zh: Go 语言中过度 nil 指针检查
items.summary_en: The post argues that overusing nil-pointer checks in Go can bloat code and obscure logic, recommending a balance between defensive checks and relying on proper nil-safe patterns or error handling. Practical tips include leveraging early returns and natural zero values to reduce noise.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为在 Go 语言中过度使用 nil 指针检查会让代码臃肿、降低可读性，建议在防御性检查和使用正确的 nil 安全模式或错误处理之间取得平衡。实用建议包括提前返回、利用零值自然避免冗余检查等。

items.title_en: AI boom risks global financial crash, warn central bankers
items.title_zh: AI 热潮可能引发全球金融崩溃？央行警告
items.summary_en: Central bankers warn that the AI boom could destabilize markets and trigger a global financial crash, citing inflated tech valuations, funding risk, and productivity misreads. They urge macroprudential tools and careful policy framing to prevent a tech-driven downturn.
items.summary_zh: 央行高层警告，AI 热潮可能推高科技估值、融资风险并扭曲生产力评估，带来全球金融崩溃的隐患。建议强化宏观审慎工具与政策框架，以防范由技术泡沫引发的系统性风险。

items.title_en: Pre-Modern Armies for Worldbuilders, Part III: Paying for It
items.title_zh: 前现代军队世界观构建者指南第三部分：如何为其付费
items.summary_en: Part III of a worldbuilding series explains how to bankroll pre-modern armies, covering budgets, logistics, and sourcing of resources. The guide offers practical rules to keep imagined economies and military campaigns plausible.
items.summary_zh: 前现代军队世界观构建者指南第三部分，聚焦如何为军队筹资，涵盖预算、后勤与资源获取。提供实用规则，帮助设定更可信的历史/虚构经济与军事行动。

items.title_en: The Doom Justifies the Valuation
items.title_zh: 末日风险正当化估值
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing that looming doomsday-scale risks can influence how investors value tech ventures, framing risk as justification for bold bets.
items.summary_zh: 提出一种挑衅性的观点，认为临近的末日级风险会影响投资者对科技企业的估值，将风险视为大胆投资的正当理由。

items.title_en: Advanced Nintendo Entertainment System (ANES) – NES Modded to Use 2 PPUs
items.title_zh: ANES：改装 NES 使用两颗 PPU
items.summary_en: ANES modded NES adds a second PPU to boost graphics capabilities, enabling more advanced rendering and effects beyond the stock hardware. It showcases enthusiastic retro hardware hacking and pushes the boundaries of what 8-bit systems can display.
items.summary_zh: ANES 将 NES 改装，增加第二颗 PPU，以提升图形能力，实现比原始硬件更复杂的渲染效果，体现了复古硬件爱好者的技术热情与创新。

items.title_en: Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID) controllers
items.title_zh: 比例-积分-微分（PID）控制器
items.summary_en: Provides an overview of PID controllers, showing how proportional, integral, and derivative terms work together to regulate systems. Includes common tuning methods and examples across robotics and process control.
items.summary_zh: 概述 PID 控制器，解释比例、积分、微分三项如何协同作用以稳定系统，并介绍常见的调参方法及在机器人和过程控制中的应用示例。

items.title_en: Samsung demonstrates 3D stacked FETs with triple nanosheet channels at 42nm
items.title_zh: 三星在 42nm 制程上展示三纳米片通道的3D堆叠晶体管
items.summary_en: Samsung demonstrates 3D stacked FETs with triple nanosheet channels on a 42nm process, signaling continued transistor scaling via 3D architectures and potential AI/compute gains.
items.summary_zh: 三星在 42nm 制程上展示了采用三纳米片通道的3D 堆叠晶体管，显示出通过 3D 架构推动晶体管密度与性能提升的前景。

items.title_en: Show HN: Adrafinil – keep a lid-closed Mac awake only while agents work
items.title_zh: Show HN：Adrafinil——让合上盖的 Mac 仅在任务代理运行时保持唤醒
items.summary_en: A lightweight tool lets a Mac with the lid closed stay awake only when specified background agents are running. This highlights how macOS manages sleep states for headless workflows and could simplify remote automation setups.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个轻量工具，允许合上盖的 Mac 在指定后台代理运行时保持唤醒。它揭示了 macOS 睡眠管理在无头工作流中的行为，并可能简化远程自动化的部署。

items.title_en: Parallel Parentheses Matching
items.title_zh: 并行括号匹配
items.summary_en: The post presents a parallel approach to matching parentheses, illustrating how concurrency ideas can speed up a classic parsing problem. It highlights trade-offs in synchronization and workload distribution relevant to compilers and text-processing pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 文中给出一种并行化的括号匹配思路，展示并发如何加速这一经典解析问题。讨论了同步与任务分配的权衡，对编译器和文本处理流水线具有现实意义。

items.title_en: DisplayMate
items.title_zh: DisplayMate 评测工具
items.summary_en: DisplayMate is a rigorous display testing site known for objective color accuracy, calibration, and performance metrics. For hardware teams and enthusiasts, it provides benchmarks that guide monitor buyers and design choices.
items.summary_zh: DisplayMate 是一个以客观色彩准确度、校准与性能指标著称的显示器评测平台，为硬件团队与发烧友提供有助于选购与设计的基准数据。

items.title_en: Minimus container images are now free
items.title_zh: Minimus 容器镜像免费开放
items.summary_en: Minimus announces free access to its ultra-small container images, lowering barriers for startups and edge deployments to ship minimal, faster containers. The move may accelerate adoption in CI/test workloads and push other minimal image providers to emulate free tiers.
items.summary_zh: Minimus 宣布其超小型容器镜像免费开放，降低初创和边缘部署的成本与门槛。此举可能推动在 CI/测试工作负载中的采用，并促使其他极简镜像提供商效仿免费策略。

items.title_en: California legislature agrees to upload driver's licenses to national database
items.title_zh: 加州立法机构同意将驾照信息上传至国家数据库
items.summary_en: California lawmakers approve plans to upload driver's license data to a national database, signaling a push toward centralized identity verification. The move raises privacy, security, and civil liberties concerns while improving interoperability.
items.summary_zh: 加州立法机构批准将驾照信息上传至国家数据库，显示出向集中身份验证的趋势。此举提升互操作性，但也引发隐私、安全与公民自由方面的担忧。

items.title_en: Lift4D: Harmonizing Single-View 3D Estimation for 4D Reconstruction In-the-Wild
items.title_zh: Lift4D：将单视角3D估计整合以实现野外场景的4D重建
items.summary_en: Lift4D harmonizes single-view 3D estimation to enable robust 4D reconstruction in-the-wild, producing temporally coherent dynamic scenes from unconstrained footage. This advances AR/VR, robotics, and film workflows by enabling reliable monocular-based 4D models.
items.summary_zh: Lift4D 将单视角 3D 估计协调起来，实现对未受控场景的时序一致的 4D 重建。利用单目线索在时间上保持一致，能够从自由拍摄的素材中构建动态场景模型，推动 AR/VR、机器人和影视工作流的发展。

items.title_en: Engineering for Bounded Cognition
items.title_zh: 面向有限认知的工程设计
items.summary_en: Examines how human cognitive limits shape engineering decisions, from UI to decision support. Emphasizes reducing cognitive load with simpler defaults and clearer feedback to prevent mistakes.
items.summary_zh: 探讨人类认知边界如何影响工程决策，从用户界面到决策支持系统。强调通过更简单的默认设置和清晰反馈来降低认知负荷，减少错误。

items.title_en: Build Yourself Flowers
items.title_zh: 自己动手做花朵
items.summary_en: Build Yourself Flowers explores designing personal projects and daily practices that yield tangible rewards or 'flowers' of fulfillment. It offers actionable tips to cultivate creativity, patience, and self-kindness in everyday life.
items.summary_zh: 《自己动手做花朵》探讨如何通过设计个人项目与日常实践来收获真实的成就感（如同“花朵”一般的回报）。文中提供可落地的建议，帮助培养创造力、耐心与善待自己的习惯。

items.title_en: window.showDirectoryPicker opens up a whole new world
items.title_zh: window.showDirectoryPicker 开启全新可能
items.summary_en: ShowDirectoryPicker enables web apps to access a user-chosen directory, unlocking batch processing, file enumeration, and better offline workflows in a secure, permission-controlled way. It opens new patterns for web apps that need filesystem access.
items.summary_zh: showDirectoryPicker 让网页应用能访问用户选择的目录，支持批处理、文件枚举与更完整的离线工作流，并在权限控制下保证安全。为需要文件系统访问的网页应用带来新用例。

items.title_en: Show HN: Hacker News on a train station-style flip board
items.title_zh: Show HN：把 Hacker News 做成火车站风格的翻牌看板
items.summary_en: Show HN presents a Hacker News feed displayed on a train-station-style flip board, showcasing a hands-on demo of real-time content rendering with a retro UI. It highlights a playful, hardware-inflected approach to information display.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示把 Hacker News 投放在火车站风格的翻牌板上，实现实时内容呈现与简洁界面的现场演示。这个项目以有趣的硬件界面呈现信息密度与可访问性的结合。

items.title_en: A C++ implementation of a fast hash map and hash set using hopscotch hashing
items.title_zh: 基于跳跃哈希的快速哈希映射与集合（C++ 实现）
items.summary_en: Tessil's hopscotch-map provides a fast, cache-friendly C++ hash map and hash set using hopscotch hashing. The implementation emphasizes low latency and strong performance for systems programming and high-throughput workloads.
items.summary_zh: Tessil 的 hopscotch-map 提供使用跳跃哈希的高速哈希映射与集合，缓存友好、冲突代价低，适合对性能敏感的系统级或高吞吐量应用。

items.title_en: Lisp in the Rust Type System
items.title_zh: 在 Rust 的类型系统中的 Lisp 实现
items.summary_en: A provocative demonstration of encoding Lisp concepts inside Rust's type system, pushing the boundaries of type-level programming and offering insights for DSL design.
items.summary_zh: 在 Rust 的类型系统中编码 Lisp 概念的前卫演示，推动类型级编程的边界，并为 DSL 设计提供见解。

items.title_en: A Farmer Arrested for Going 5 Seconds over His Time Limit at Data Center Meeting
items.title_zh: 因超时仅5秒，农民在数据中心会议上被逮捕
items.summary_en: A farmer attending a data center governance meeting was arrested for going five seconds over his allotted time. The report spotlights the friction between time limits at public-interest tech forums and enforcement practices.
items.summary_zh: 一名农民在参加数据中心治理会议时超时仅5秒便被逮捕，此事引发对科技治理场合中的时间限制与安保执法方式的争议。

items.title_en: Show HN: MiniPCs.zip – Charting the Pareto frontier of Mini PCs
items.title_zh: Show HN: MiniPCs.zip – 迷你 PC 的帕累托前沿
items.summary_en: MiniPCs.zip charts the Pareto frontier of mini PCs, comparing size, CPU, GPU, RAM, and price to identify best value options.
items.summary_zh: MiniPCs.zip 汇总了迷你PC的帕累托前沿，按尺寸、处理器、显卡、内存与价格等维度对比，帮助用户快速找到性价比最高的机型。

items.title_en: Bashblog – a single bash script to create blogs
items.title_zh: Bashblog：用一个 Bash 脚本搭建博客
items.summary_en: A minimal blogging workflow powered by one Bash script that handles post creation and publishing. It demonstrates how frugal tooling can replace heavier CMS stacks for personal sites.
items.summary_zh: 一个用单一 Bash 脚本实现的极简博客工作流，负责创建和发布文章。它展示了简约工具链如何替代重量级 CMS 来搭建个人站点。

items.title_en: Apple is going to raise device prices, but when?
items.title_zh: 苹果设备价格即将上涨？何时涨价
items.summary_en: Analysts suggest Apple could raise device prices; timing may align with product cycles and macro conditions, signaling consumers to expect higher price points at future launches.
items.summary_zh: 分析人士指出苹果设备价格可能上涨，涨幅与产品周期和宏观条件相关，暗示未来新品发布时价格将提高。

items.title_en: Wayfinder Router: deterministic routing of queries between local and hosted LLM
items.title_zh: Wayfinder 路由器：在本地与托管大模型之间的确定性查询路由
items.summary_en: Wayfinder Router targets deterministic routing between a local LLM and a hosted one, aiming to optimize latency, privacy, and cost for hybrid AI setups. The approach helps designers build edge-friendly AI flows where data privacy and responsiveness matter most.
items.summary_zh: Wayfinder 路由器在本地与托管大模型之间实现确定性查询路由，意在降低延迟、提升隐私并控制成本。该思路有助于设计混合 AI 部署，提升边缘计算场景的响应速度。

items.title_en: Fusion Programming Language
items.title_zh: Fusion 编程语言
items.summary_en: Fusion is a new programming language aiming to blend functional concepts with high-performance, data-centric programming. It emphasizes unified syntax and compiler optimizations to target CPUs and accelerators, enabling safer, faster parallel code.
items.summary_zh: Fusion 是一门新型编程语言，旨在将函数式思想与高性能、数据密集型编程结合。它强调统一的语法与编译器优化，目标是在 CPU 与加速器上高效并行执行。

items.title_en: Markdy: Like Mermaid Diagrams, but for Motion
items.title_zh: Markdy：像 Mermaid 图一样处理运动
items.summary_en: Markdy offers a textual DSL resembling Mermaid diagrams but focused on motion and animation workflows. It lets creators describe timing, transitions, and dependencies in a readable format, producing diagrams that aid planning and collaboration on complex motion systems.
items.summary_zh: Markdy 提供一种类似 Mermaid 的文本语言，专注于运动与动画工作流。它让创作者用易读的格式描述时序、过渡和依赖，生成的图表有助于规划与协同处理复杂的运动系统。

items.title_en: Running Windows Games on a Hobby OS with Wine
items.title_zh: 在业余操作系统上用 Wine 运行 Windows 游戏
items.summary_en: A hobby OS runs Windows games via Wine, with notes on compatibility and performance versus native tooling. It demonstrates how open-source ecosystems push practical cross-platform gaming, even on niche hardware.
items.summary_zh: 该项目演示在业余操作系统上通过 Wine 运行 Windows 游戏，并给出兼容性与性能的综合评估。体现开源生态在跨平台游戏体验中的实际应用潜力。

items.title_en: Why eval startups fail (2025)
items.title_zh: 评估型初创企业为何失败（2025）
items.summary_en: Examines why evaluation-focused startups struggle to scale in 2025, highlighting issues like ambiguous value propositions, high customer acquisition costs, and data or compliance hurdles. It distills actionable lessons for founders, investors, and ecosystem builders to improve go-to-market discipline and unit economics.
items.summary_zh: 分析了2025年以评估服务为核心的初创企业为何难以扩张，指出价值定位不清、获客成本高、数据与合规风险等常见问题。提供对创始人、投资人和生态建设者的可操作建议，帮助提升市场定位与单位经济效益。

items.title_en: Working around dragons with the Lemote Yeeloong laptop and OpenBSD
items.title_zh: 用 Lemote Yeeloong 笔记本与 OpenBSD 的生存笔记
items.summary_en: A retro-tech diary recounts installing OpenBSD on a Lemote Yeeloong laptop, a machine built around the Loongson CPU. It details the hardware quirks, drivers, and boot issues encountered, plus workarounds and patches. The post underscores the enduring appeal of free software tinkering on obscure hardware.
items.summary_zh: 这篇回顾性笔记记录了在以龙芯处理器为基础的 Lemote Yeeloong 笔记本上安装 OpenBSD 的过程，面临硬件兼容性、驱动与引导问题等挑战，并给出相应的解决方法与补丁。文章凸显了在冷门硬件上坚持开源、动手实践的魅力。

items.title_en: The US Used to Demand the Best Tech. Now We Ban It
items.title_zh: 美国曾追求最先进科技，如今却在实施禁令
items.summary_en: The piece argues that U.S. policy shifted from procuring cutting-edge tech to banning or constraining it, with implications for domestic innovation, supply chains, and competitiveness. It calls for balancing national security with maintaining leadership in tech.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为美国的政策已从追求最先进技术转向禁止或限制使用，影响国内创新、供应链和全球竞争力。呼吁在国家安全与科技领先之间取得更好的平衡。

items.title_en: LaTeX.wasm: LaTeX Engines in Browsers
items.title_zh: LaTeX.wasm：浏览器中的 LaTeX 引擎
items.summary_en: LaTeX.wasm brings LaTeX processing into the browser, enabling client-side typesetting without server round-trips. This improves privacy and offline capabilities for editors and learners, while challenging server-centric workflows.
items.summary_zh: LaTeX.wasm 将 LaTeX 处理移至浏览器端，使前端即可完成排版，无需来回服务器。对编辑器和学习者而言提高了隐私与离线能力，同时也对以服务器为中心的工作流提出挑战。

items.title_en: Inventing the Future, One Lisp Machine at a Time
items.title_zh: 逐步用 Lisp 机器重塑未来
items.summary_en: Inventing the Future, One Lisp Machine at a Time threads nostalgia for Lisp machines into a meditation on language and hardware design. It uses historical machines to reflect on modern computing and the value of specialized architectures.
items.summary_zh: 通过 Lisp 机器的历史回顾，将对过去的情感融入对现代计算的思考，探讨语言与体系结构的价值，以及专业化架构在未来中的角色。

items.title_en: F* file system – file search that reads SSD directly bypassing OS kernel
items.title_zh: F* 文件系统——直接读取SSD以绕过内核的文件搜索
items.summary_en: F* is a file system project that reads SSDs directly to perform fast searches, bypassing the OS kernel. It trades portability and broad compatibility for speed and custom indexing, raising questions about stability and security.
items.summary_zh: F* 文件系统通过直接读取 SSD 来实现快速搜索，绕过操作系统内核。它以提升速度和自定义索引为代价，牺牲了一定的可移植性与安全性，引发对稳定性与安全性的讨论。

items.title_en: FEXPRs vs. vtable: how LispE interpreter works
items.title_zh: FEXPR 与 vtable：LispE 解释器的工作原理
items.summary_en: The LispE interpreter discussion contrasts FEXPRs and vtables, explaining how LispE handles dynamic evaluation and function calls. It sheds light on design choices that balance expressiveness, performance, and memory use.
items.summary_zh: 本文对 LispE 解释器中的 FEXPR 与 vtable 进行对比，解释其在动态求值和函数调用方面的实现方式。解析这些设计取舍如何在表达能力、性能和内存消耗之间取得平衡。

items.title_en: Examining circuit boards from the Space Shuttle's I/O Processor
items.title_zh: Space Shuttle I/O 处理器的电路板考察
items.summary_en: A deep dive into Space Shuttle I/O Processor boards reveals the hardware that ran critical avionics.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章深入解读航天飞机 I/O 处理器的电路板，展示了在关键飞行控制中运行的硬件。文中介绍了板卡的架构、设计细节与挑战，并从历史 NASA 系统中提取了可靠性与硬件安全性的经验教训。

items.title_en: Canyon HUD helmet for road riding
items.title_zh: Canyon 公路骑行抬头显示头盔
items.summary_en: Canyon's road-hiking helmet includes a built-in HUD that projects ride data and navigation into the rider's line of sight. While it could boost awareness and route follow-through, engineers warn about distraction, battery drain, and privacy implications as sensor data may be collected.
items.summary_zh: Canyon 推出集成抬头显示的公路骑行头盔，实现在骑行中实时显示速度、导航等信息。该设计有望提升骑手安全与决策能力，但也引发分心、续航以及传感数据隐私等问题的讨论。

items.title_en: Big AI labs are hiring philosophers
items.title_zh: Big AI labs are hiring philosophers
items.summary_en: AI labs are hiring philosophers to grapple with ethics, alignment, and long-term governance. This trend signals a growing emphasis on interdisciplinary thinking to address safety, policy, and societal impact as AI systems scale.
items.summary_zh: AI 实验室正在招聘哲学家以应对伦理、对齐与长期治理等议题。这一趋势表明，随着 AI 系统规模扩大，跨学科思维在安全、政策与社会影响方面的重要性日益增强。

items.title_en: Crawling BitTorrent DHTs for Fun and Profit [pdf]
items.title_zh: 为乐与利润：对 BitTorrent DHT 的爬取研究
items.summary_en: Researchers describe scalable techniques for crawling BitTorrent's DHT to map peers and content, enabling large-scale measurement of decentralized file sharing. While providing valuable insights into network dynamics and resilience, the work also raises privacy and abuse concerns.
items.summary_zh: 这篇研究论文提出对 BitTorrent DHT 进行大规模爬取的技术方法，用以观测对等节点、内容分布和网络动态。研究提供了对去中心化文件分享的可观测性与鲁棒性见解，同时也暴露了隐私与滥用的风险。

items.title_en: 52-hertz whale
items.title_zh: 52赫兹鲸鱼
items.summary_en: The 52-hertz whale is famous for vocalizations at a frequency far from other whales, making it a symbol of loneliness and scientific mystery in ocean acoustics.
items.summary_zh: 52赫兹鲸被认为是发出远超常见鲸鳴的频率的孤独鲸，成为海洋声学研究与科普的神话象征。

items.title_en: An Introduction to YOLO26
items.title_zh: YOLO26 入门
items.summary_en: YOLO26 is the latest in the YOLO family, delivering real-time object detection with improved speed and accuracy. The post outlines architectural tweaks and training ideas that enable end-to-end performance.
items.summary_zh: YOLO26 作为 YOLO 家族的最新成员，在实时对象检测上提供更快的速度与更高的准确性。文章介绍了改进的架构和训练思路，以实现端到端的高性能。

items.title_en: Rent collections are down in New York
items.title_zh: 纽约租金收取率下降，原因尚不明
items.summary_en: Rent collections in New York are down, with economists and landlords searching for explanations amid data gaps and shifting rental markets. The drop could signal broader macro trends or local policy or economic shifts affecting cash flow for landlords and tenants.
items.summary_zh: 纽约的租金收取率下降，数据不清与市场变化使经济学家和房东寻找原因。下滑可能反映宏观趋势、地方政策或经济因素对房东与租客现金流的影响。

items.title_en: Nintendo Wii U games running from a 1980's Bernoulli disk [video]
items.title_zh: 视频：在1980年代 Bernoulli 磁盘上运行任天堂 Wii U 游戏
items.summary_en: A video demonstrates running Nintendo Wii U games from a 1980s Bernoulli disk, a remarkable homage to retro hardware and preservation. It showcases the enduring challenges of emulation, hardware reuse, and the ingenuity needed to revive old software stacks.
items.summary_zh: 视频演示将任天堂 Wii U 游戏在1980年代的 Bernoulli 磁盘上运行，彰显对老旧硬件与软件的保护与再利用的创新。此现象凸显仿真与向后兼容性在游戏保存领域的重要性与挑战。

items.title_en: Space Shuttle Endeavour's 20-story vertical display
items.title_zh: Space Shuttle Endeavour 的20层高竖立展览
items.summary_en: The California Science Center unveils a 20-story vertical display of Space Shuttle Endeavour, creating a dramatic keel-to-sky presentation of the orbiter. It demonstrates how large-scale engineering history can be presented in an immersive museum experience.
items.summary_zh: 加州科学中心推出 Space Shuttle Endeavour 的20层高竖立展览，带来震撼的工程史展示。此举体现博物馆如何通过大型物理装置讲述科技史。

items.title_en: TOP500 at ISC’26: We have a New Number 1 Supercomputer
items.title_zh: ISC’26 TOP500：诞生新一代第一的超级计算机
items.summary_en: ISC’26 TOP500 reveals a new number-one supercomputer, underscoring ongoing advances toward exascale performance. The shift reflects how HPC architectures—driven by accelerators and energy-aware design—reshape workloads in science, AI, and simulation.
items.summary_zh: ISC’26 TOP500 公布新一代第一名超级计算机，凸显向百亿亿级性能迈进的持续进展。此变动反映出以加速器与节能设计为驱动的 HPC 架构正在重塑科学、AI 与仿真等工作负载。

items.title_en: A US military exercise to launch a satellite on short notice
items.title_zh: 一场美军在短时间内发射卫星的演习
items.summary_en: A US military exercise demonstrated rapid satellite deployment on short notice, stressing logistics, launch readiness, and space domain awareness. The exercise shows how defense planning tests real-world constraints and could influence future space operations.
items.summary_zh: 美军进行了一场在短时间内发射卫星的演习，考验后勤、发射就绪度与太空领域的态势感知。此类演练揭示在现实约束下的作战部署能力，可能影响未来的太空作战规划。

items.title_en: Tw-fade: pure CSS scroll-driven edge masking
items.title_zh: Tw-fade：纯 CSS 滚动驱动的边缘遮罩
items.summary_en: Tw-fade demonstrates a pure CSS technique for scroll-driven edge masking, enabling subtle fade effects on scroll without JavaScript. It showcases how CSS variables and lightweight techniques can deliver dynamic UI polish with zero script.
items.summary_zh: Tw-fade 展示了一种纯 CSS 的滚动驱动边缘遮罩实现，滚动时可以实现微妙的渐变效果，无需 JavaScript。通过 CSS 变量等轻量化方法，展示了无需脚本即可实现的动态 UI 优雅度。

items.title_en: Investors get real-time view of UK bond market activity for the first time
items.title_zh: 投资者首次获得英国债券市场实时交易活动视图
items.summary_en: For the first time, real-time data on UK gilt trading activity is accessible to investors. Regulators enable near-instant visibility into liquidity and price formation, improving transparency in a historically opaque market. Expect shifts in trading strategies and market-maker behavior as participants adapt to live information.
items.summary_zh: 投资者首次获得英国国债交易活动的实时数据，提升市场透明度。监管方实现对流动性与价格形成的近实时监控，这一市场过去相对不透明。随着参与者适应实时信息，交易策略与做市商行为可能发生变化。

items.title_en: Windows NT for GameCube/Wii
items.title_zh: GameCube/Wii 的 Windows NT
items.summary_en: A hobby project to port Windows NT to GameCube/Wii hardware explores feasibility, compatibility, and the engineering challenges of running an older OS on game consoles.
items.summary_zh: 一个爱好者项目尝试将 Windows NT 移植到 GameCube/Wii 硬件，探讨在游戏机上运行老系统的可行性、兼容性与工程挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: DRM-Free Books
items.title_zh: Show HN：无 DRM 的图书
items.summary_en: Show HN features a collection of DRM-free books, illustrating demand for unencumbered digital libraries. By removing DRM, it argues for easier sharing, long-term preservation, and improved user rights.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一批无 DRM 的图书，体现了对无版权限制数字图书馆的需求。移除 DRM 能带来更易分享、长期保存和提升用户权益的好处。

items.title_en: Regular expressions that work “everywhere”
items.title_zh: 能在任何地方都能用的正则表达式
items.summary_en: John Cook argues for regex patterns that behave consistently across languages and engines, confronting portability pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: John Cook 讨论了在不同语言与引擎中都能稳定工作的正则表达式模式，直面可移植性难题。文中给出兼容性强的实用模式与应避免的反模式，以防止意外匹配与性能陷阱。

items.title_en: Do Babies Dream of Baby Sheep?
items.title_zh: 宝宝会梦见小羊吗？
items.summary_en: A playful exploration of early dreams and REM sleep in infants, leveraging science communication to question what babies dream about. The piece implies that while we don't know what babies dream about, studying infant sleep sheds light on cognitive development.
items.summary_zh: 以玩笑笔触探讨婴儿的梦境与快速发展的睡眠阶段，讨论婴儿在梦境中可能的内容。文章指出，虽然尚无法确定婴儿梦见何物，研究婴儿睡眠有助于理解认知发展的早期阶段。

items.title_en: Quebec town recognizes trees as living beings with rights
items.title_zh: 魁北克小镇承认树木拥有法律权利
items.summary_en: A Quebec town recognizes trees as living beings with legal rights, granting them protection in municipal decisions. The move raises questions about environmental ethics, governance, and how such rights interact with development.
items.summary_zh: 魁北克小镇将树木视为具法律权利的存在，在城政决策中给予保护。这一举措引发关于环境伦理、治理以及树木权利与发展之间关系的讨论。

items.title_en: I can haz smoller NixOS ISOs?
items.title_zh: 我能得到更小的 NixOS ISO？
items.summary_en: I can haz smoller NixOS ISOs? discusses efforts to produce smaller installation images for NixOS, focusing on reducing image size and footprint, and the trade-offs with feature completeness and build configurations.
items.summary_zh: 讨论为 NixOS 制作更小的安装镜像的尝试，聚焦于减小镜像体积与保留核心功能之间的权衡，以及可能的构建配置与实现路径。

items.title_en: Turning music into a chore is how I became a musician (2022)
items.title_zh: 把练习变成“家务活”，是我成为音乐家的原因（2022）
items.summary_en: A personal reflection on how reframing music practice as a daily routine helped reduce friction and deepen skill, ultimately shaping the author into a musician. It argues that disciplined, repeatable habits foster creativity rather than kill it.
items.summary_zh: 通过将音乐练习日常化、制度化来降低难度、提升技艺的个体反思。作者认为有纪律、可重复的习惯能激发创造力，而非抹煞它。

items.title_en: The open source DOCX editor submitted to HN a few weeks ago has been deleted
items.title_zh: 几周前提交到 HN 的开源 DOCX 编辑器已被删除
items.summary_en: Notes that an open-source DOCX editor discussed on Hacker News was deleted; the postmortem hints at project fragility, maintenance costs, or governance challenges in niche OSS tools. The outcome underscores sustainability risks for open editors dealing with proprietary formats.
items.summary_zh: 描述一款在 Hacker News 上不久前被讨论的开源 DOCX 编辑器已被删除的情况，反映出小众开源工具在维护与治理方面的脆弱性。事件凸显了在处理受专利和格式限制的工具时，OSS 项目在可持续性方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: WebBase-III – dBASE III rebuilt in the browser with its own interpreter
items.title_zh: Swsim：软件化 SIM 卡
items.summary_en: Swsim presents a software SIM card approach, allowing SIM credentials to be managed in software rather than a physical SIM. The project explores implications for carrier provisioning, device flexibility, and security risk in software-defined SIMs.
items.summary_zh: Swsim 提供软件化 SIM 卡方案，使 SIM 证书在软件中管理，而非物理 SIM。该项目探讨对运营商配置、设备灵活性以及软件定义 SIM 的安全风险的影响。

items.title_en: Too many R packages: CRAN is inundated with submissions
items.title_zh: CRAN 收到的 R 包提交过多
items.summary_en: CRAN is inundated with package submissions, creating backlogs and strained maintenance pipelines.
items.summary_zh: CRAN 的包提交量激增，致使审核与维护流程承压，出现积压。文章探讨了质量保证、可重复性，以及可能的自动化审查或替代托管方案。

items.title_en: GloriousEggroll's Proton has been rebased on Proton 11
items.title_zh: GloriousEggroll 的 Proton 11 重基
items.summary_en: Proton GE’s rebasing onto Proton 11 signals improved compatibility and performance for Windows games on Linux via Steam Play. The update reflects ongoing community-driven improvements that broaden the Linux gaming landscape and reduce compatibility frictions.
items.summary_zh: GloriousEggroll 将 Proton 重基到 Proton 11，带来对 Linux 上 Steam Play 的更多游戏兼容性与性能提升。这类社区驱动的持续改进正在扩展 Linux 游戏生态，降低兼容性摩擦。

items.title_en: The origins of the school system aimed to produce independent, critical thinkers (2024)
items.title_zh: 教育体系的起源：旨在培养独立、批判性思维者
items.summary_en: Explores the historical roots of schooling designed to cultivate independent, critical thinking. The piece traces reform movements and pedagogical ideas that shifted authority away from rote learning toward analytical inquiry.
items.summary_zh: 本文追溯了旨在培养独立、批判性思维的教育制度的历史根源。回顾改革运动与教学理念如何从灌输式教育转向以分析性探究为核心的教学模式。

items.title_en: The truth about being a manager
items.title_zh: 成为经理的真相
items.summary_en: A candid piece debunks myths about management, arguing that being a manager is more about enabling others than issuing orders, with practical guidance on building teams and communication.
items.summary_zh: 这篇直言不讳的文章揭穿了管理者的神话，认为管理并非单纯发号施令，而是帮助他人实现目标，并提供打造高效团队与沟通的实用建议。

items.title_en: Hellishly Slow Level 13 Deflate Compression
items.title_zh: 地狱般缓慢的 Level 13 Deflate 压缩
