items.summary_en: The piece investigates why Deflate level 13 compression is exceptionally slow, highlighting the computational complexity and trade-offs in implementation. It shows that higher compression levels bring steep CPU costs with diminishing returns on real-world data.
items.summary_zh: 文章探究了 Deflate 在 Level 13 时异常缓慢的原因，强调了计算复杂性与实现取舍。结果表明更高的压缩等级会带来极高的 CPU 开销，在实际数据上收益往往递减。

items.title_en: Pull request limits are cutting down the noise
items.title_zh: Pull request 限制正在降低噪声
items.summary_en: Raising PR limits helps maintainers focus on meaningful changes and reduces review fatigue. By throttling contributed changes, teams can speed up CI cycles and improve code quality. The piece shares practical guidelines for applying limits without stifling collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 提升拉取请求限制有助于维护者专注于有意义的改动，降低评审疲劳。通过对提交数量设限，团队可以加快持续集成循环并提升代码质量。文章给出在不扼杀协作的前提下落实现限的方法与要点。

items.title_en: One man, two kernels, and a lot of RISC-V
items.title_zh: 一人两种内核，以及大量的 RISC‑V
items.summary_en: A solo developer experiments with running two kernels on the same RISC-V setup, illustrating the practicality and limits of multi-kernel experimentation on an open ISA. The work underscores RISC-V's openness to unconventional designs and the ongoing challenge of kernel portability and security.
items.summary_zh: 一名开发者在同一 RISC‑V 平台上尝试运行两种内核，展示在开放指令集架构上进行多内核试验的可行性与局限性。此举凸显 RISC‑V 的开放性为非常规设计留出空间，同时也暴露内核移植和安全性方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Doing a masters while working in Spain
items.title_zh: 在西班牙工作同时攻读硕士学位
items.summary_en: Balancing work in Spain with pursuing a master's degree is feasible with the right program choices and planning.
items.summary_zh: 在西班牙工作的人同时攻读硕士学位是可行的，需要选对课程、做好时间规划。文章讨论了课程形式、签证与工作安排等实际要点，以及在线与现场学习的权衡。

items.title_en: The cost YAGNI was never about
items.title_zh: YAGNI 从来不是关于成本
items.summary_en: YAGNI's cost isn't a simple price tag. The piece reframes the 'cost' as the hidden maintenance burden and reduced future flexibility that come from over-simplifying early, urging a nuanced balance between foregone features and long-term adaptability.
items.summary_zh: YAGNI 的代价并非简单的金钱或时间成本。文章将“成本”重新界定为因过早简化而带来的隐藏维护负担和未来灵活性的降低，强调在实现与扩展之间需要更细致的权衡。

items.title_en: Genuinely, my all-time favourite image: Mamenchisaurus hochuanensis
items.title_zh: 我心中的最爱图片：Mamenchisaurus hochuanensis
items.summary_en: A paleontology blog highlights its all-time favourite image of Mamenchisaurus hochuanensis, likely a striking fossil photo or illustration. The post spotlights the enduring appeal of long-neck sauropods and how visual artifacts shape science communication.
items.summary_zh: 博主分享心中最喜欢的恐龙图像——脊龙 Mamenchisaurus hochuanensis，可能是一张引人注目的化石照片或插画。文章强调长颈龙在科普传播中的独特魅力及视觉材料对科学传播的影响。

items.title_en: Blogger defeats photographer's copyright claim
items.title_zh: 博主击败摄影师的版权主张
items.summary_en: A blogger won a copyright claim in a dispute with a photographer, illustrating evolving limits of image rights and the complexities of fair use in online publishing. The outcome underscores how courts balance transformation, attribution, and monetization in user-generated content.
items.summary_zh: 一起博客作者在与摄影师的版权纠纷中胜诉，凸显图像版权边界的不断演化以及在线发布中的合理使用复杂性。结果体现了改编、署名和商业化之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Die analysis of the 8087 math coprocessor's fast bit shifter (2020)
items.title_zh: 8087 数学协处理器的快速位移器 Die 分析
items.summary_en: A deep dive into the 8087 math coprocessor’s die reveals how its fast bit shifter was implemented, shedding light on early floating-point acceleration and microarchitectural tradeoffs. The post adds historical perspective on performance engineering.
items.summary_zh: 对 8087 数学协处理器的芯片进行深度分析，揭示其快速位移器的实现方式，展示早期浮点运算加速的微架构权衡，并提供对性能工程的历史视角。

items.title_en: Exploiting vulnerabilities in Johnson and Johnson web apps
items.title_zh: Exploiting vulnerabilities in Johnson and Johnson web apps
items.summary_en: Security researchers describe vulnerabilities in Johnson & Johnson's web apps, illustrating healthcare IT risk and the urgency of timely patching and secure development practices. The disclosure underscores the fragile surface of consumer health platforms.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究人员揭示强生网页应用中的漏洞，凸显医疗健康 IT 的风险以及及时打补丁与安全开发实践的紧迫性。此类披露强调了消费者健康平台易受攻击的脆弱面。

items.title_en: Show HN: Turn native language audio into flashcards and shadowing practice
items.title_zh: Show HN：将母语音频转化为单词卡和跟读练习
items.summary_en: Lingochunk offers a tool that converts native-language audio into flashcards and shadowing prompts for language learning. It enables rapid creation of practice material from real conversations, lowering barrier to immersion.
items.summary_zh: Lingochunk 提供的工具可将母语对话音频转化为单词卡和跟读练习材料，使学习者能够从真实对话中快速生成练习内容，降低沉浸式学习的门槛。

items.title_en: An Embedded Linux on a Single Floppy
items.title_zh: 单一软盘上的嵌入式 Linux
items.summary_en: Demonstrates a tiny embedded Linux that can run from a single floppy disk, illustrating constraints-driven design and the feasibility of ultra-small systems. A useful reference for retro computing and constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: 展示可从单张软盘启动的极小型嵌入式 Linux，体现了在资源受限环境下的设计可行性。对复古计算和约束驱动的嵌入式项目具有参考意义。

items.title_en: Tell HN: OpenAI has started putting ads on paid programs
items.title_zh: Tell HN：OpenAI 已在付费计划中投放广告
items.summary_en: OpenAI reportedly started showing ads in some paid programs, prompting criticism about monetization and user experience. The move raises questions about how AI companies balance revenue with value, and potential conflicts of interest.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，OpenAI 在部分付费计划中开始投放广告，引发关于商业化与用户体验的争议。此举将引发对 AI 公司在创收与用户价值之间平衡的质疑，以及潜在的利益冲突。

items.title_en: Knowledge Distillation of Black-Box Large Language Models (2024)
items.title_zh: 对黑箱大语言模型的知识蒸馏（2024）
items.summary_en: This 2024 work studies distilling knowledge from black-box LLMs into smaller, trainable models without access to internal weights. Through comparisons of techniques like output-based distillation and data augmentation, it shows trade-offs between fidelity and efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 2024 年的工作研究在无法访问内部权重的前提下，将黑箱大语言模型的知识蒸馏到更小的模型中。通过对比输出蒸馏、数据增强等方法，揭示保真度与效率之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Epidurals are a miracle technology
items.title_zh: 硬膜外麻醉是一项奇迹般的技术
items.summary_en: A meditation on epidurals as a transformative pain-management technology, tracing historical impact, safety considerations, and ongoing debates in anesthesia.
items.summary_zh: 对硬膜外麻醉作为 Pain 管理技术的变革性作用进行反思，回顾历史影响、安全性考量以及相关的持续讨论。

items.title_en: Gossamer: a Rust-flavoured language with real goroutines and pause-free memory
items.title_zh: Gossamer：一种带有真实协程与无暂停内存的 Rust 风格语言
items.summary_en: Gossamer presents a Rust‑flavored language that provides real goroutines and pause‑free memory, aiming to improve concurrency without long GC pauses. The project envisions high‑throughput systems programming and easier asynchronous code without traditional boilerplate.
items.summary_zh: Gossamer 提供一种受 Rust 启发、具备真实协程与无暂停内存的语言，目标是在不依赖长 GC 暂停的情况下提升并发性。该项目定位高吞吐系统编程，并让异步代码编写变得更简洁。

items.title_en: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.title_zh: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 公布面向大语言模型的推理芯片
items.summary_en: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil an inference chip optimized for large language models, aiming to accelerate and reduce the cost of LLM deployments. The collaboration signals how chipmakers are aligning hardware to AI workloads and could influence data-center architectures.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 推出面向大语言模型推理的定制芯片，目标是加速并降低成本，提升数据中心对 AI 工作负载的适配。此举反映了硬件厂商正围绕 AI 任务进行更紧密的软硬件协同。

items.title_en: Why current LLM costs are not sustainable
items.title_zh: 为什么当前大型语言模型成本不可持续
items.summary_en: Current LLM costs for real-world inference and serving are rising faster than value. The piece calls out compute, storage, and energy as the bottlenecks and suggests strategies such as model optimization, selective inference, and smarter deployment to curb expenses.
items.summary_zh: 当前大型语言模型在推理与部署上的成本上升，难以持续。文章指出计算、存储与能源是瓶颈，并提出模型优化、按需推理与更高效部署等降低成本的思路。

items.title_en: Overfitted a 900KB Transformer to Compress a 100MB CSV into 7MB
items.title_zh: 用 900KB 的 Transformer 将 100MB 的 CSV 压缩到 7MB
items.summary_en: Researchers trained an ultra-compact transformer (about 900KB) that compresses a 100MB CSV down to 7MB, using learned representations rather than traditional codecs. While impressive, the result raises questions about generalization, decoding speed, and lossiness, yet hints at practical gains for edge storage and bandwidth-limited pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 研究者训练出一个约 900KB 的超紧凑 Transformer，能够把 100MB 的 CSV 压缩到 7MB，依赖学习得到的表示而非传统编解码。尽管效果震撼，但也引发关于泛化性、解码速度和丢失信息等方面的质疑，同时为边缘存储和带宽受限的数据处理带来潜在收益。

items.title_en: Reflections on software engineering in the age of AI
items.title_zh: AI 时代的软件工程反思
items.summary_en: An essay evaluating how AI changes software development—automation, code generation, and collaboration—and proposing new practices, guardrails, and learning paradigms to stay effective in the AI era.
items.summary_zh: 本文评估 AI 如何改变软件开发中的自动化、代码生成和协作，并提出在 AI 时代保持高效所需的新实践、风险控制方法与学习范式。

items.title_en: The MUMPS 76 Primer – anniversary edition
items.title_zh: MUMPS 76 入门教程——周年纪念版
items.summary_en: MUMPS is a programming language with deep ties to healthcare databases. The anniversary primer revisits the language’s syntax and usage, highlighting its enduring relevance and the quirks that have shaped legacy medical software.
items.summary_zh: MUMPS 是一种在医疗保健数据库领域有深远影响的编程语言。周年纪念版入门书回顾了它的语法与使用场景，强调该语言在遗留医疗软件中的持续相关性与独特之处。

items.title_en: I was wrong about the Midjourney ultra-sound scanner
items.title_zh: 我对 Midjourney 超声扫描仪的看法错了
items.summary_en: Admits misjudgment about the capabilities of the Midjourney ultrasound scanner, laying out what the system can and cannot do and the lessons learned.
items.summary_zh: 承认对 Midjourney 超声扫描仪功能的误判，阐述系统的实际能力与局限，以及从中得到的经验教训。

items.title_en: Mixing Visual and Textual Code
items.title_zh: 混合可视化与文本代码
items.summary_en: The arXiv paper explores combining visual representations with textual code to improve comprehension and collaboration in programming. It discusses design considerations, benefits, and potential pitfalls of hybrid code modalities.
items.summary_zh: 这篇论文探讨用视觉表示与文本代码相结合来提升编程的理解与协作，讨论了混合代码形式的设计要点、潜在好处以及可能的风险。

items.title_en: Haystack: Open-Source AI Framework for Production Ready Agents, RAG
items.title_zh: Haystack：面向生产就绪代理与 RAG 的开源 AI 框架
items.summary_en: Haystack provides a production-focused AI framework for building agents and RAG pipelines, with components for orchestrating prompts, memory, and retrieval. It helps teams move from prototype to deployment with tested connectors and evaluation tools.
items.summary_zh: Haystack 提供一个面向生产的 AI 框架，专注于构建代理与检索增强生成（RAG）管线，包含编排、记忆与检索等组件，帮助团队从原型过渡到生产部署。

items.title_en: More evidence is consistent with possible ancient life on Mars (2025)
items.title_zh: 更多证据支持火星存在古代生命的可能性（2025）
items.summary_en: New findings add to the growing but inconclusive evidence for ancient life on Mars, strengthening biosignature arguments while stopping short of confirming life.
items.summary_zh: 新的发现进一步强化了关于火星存在古代生命的证据，但仍未达到确定性，只是增加了生物标志信号的可能性。

items.title_en: Screen time can damage under-twos' development, landmark study suggests
items.title_zh: 里程碑式研究表明，屏幕时间可能损害两岁以下儿童发育
items.summary_en: A landmark study links screen time in toddlers to potential developmental harms, reinforcing guidelines to limit passive screen exposure and prioritize interactive, caregiver-led activities.
items.summary_zh: 里程碑式研究显示，幼儿的屏幕使用时间与潜在的发育风险相关，强调应限制被动屏幕暴露，优先进行互动性和在家长引导下的活动。

items.title_en: Modern GPU Programming for MLSys
items.title_zh: MLSys 的现代 GPU 编程
items.summary_en: An overview of modern GPU programming for MLSys, highlighting advances in programming models, memory hierarchies, and performance portability across GPUs. The discussion matters for ML workloads, scaling models, and building portable solutions that run on diverse accelerators.
items.summary_zh: 该文概述了 MLSys 圆桌/论文中的现代 GPU 编程，聚焦编程模型、内存层次结构与跨 GPU 的性能可移植性等进展。对机器学习工作负载、扩展模型和在多种加速器上实现可移植解决方案具有重要意义。

items.title_en: The annotated PyTorch training loop
items.title_zh: 带注释的 PyTorch 训练循环
items.summary_en: A detailed annotated PyTorch training loop clarifies data flow, loss calculation, backprop, and optimization with practical notes. It helps readers understand common pitfalls like gradient issues, device placement, and debugging training runs.
items.summary_zh: 这篇带注释的 PyTorch 训练循环清晰分解了数据流、损失、反向传播和优化步骤，并给出实践注释。对理解梯度累积、设备放置和训练调试等细节很有帮助。

items.title_en: Nvidia Halos
items.title_zh: NVIDIA Halos：AI 信任与治理计划
items.summary_en: NVIDIA's Halos program outlines an AI governance framework focusing on safety, security, and trust in autonomous and AI-enhanced systems. It signals how hardware vendors are formalizing responsibility, risk assessment, and transparency around AI features.
items.summary_zh: NVIDIA 的 Halos 计划提出一个面向 AI 治理的框架，关注安全、信任和自驾等 AI 驱动系统的风险评估与透明度。此举显示硬件厂商正将 AI 功能的安全与问责纳入产品生态。

items.title_en: Show HN: Neural Particle Automata
items.title_zh: Show HN: 神经粒子自动机
items.summary_en: Neural Particle Automata introduces a hybrid framework combining neural networks with particle-based computation to model dynamics and generative processes.
items.summary_zh: 神经粒子自动机提出一种将神经网络与基于粒子的计算结合的混合框架，用于建模动力学与生成过程。

items.title_en: Matt's Script Archive: The Scripts That Reshaped the Web
items.title_zh: Matt's Script Archive：改变了网页的脚本
items.summary_en: Tedium looks back at Matt's Script Archive, a collection of early 1990s web scripts that popularized client-side effects like hit counters, blinking text, and image rollovers, shaping web design culture.
items.summary_zh: 特刊回顾 Matt's Script Archive，这批1990年代初的网页脚本推动了客户端效果（如计数器、闪烁文本、图像翻转等），深刻影响了早期的网站设计与开发者文化。

items.title_en: Long Wave radio era set to end with Droitwich switch-off
items.title_zh: 英国 Droitwich 长波发射站停运：长波广播时代的终结
items.summary_en: Reports the switch-off of the Droitwich long-wave transmitter, marking the end of an era for long-range radio broadcasting in Britain. The article notes implications for legacy receivers, national emergency broadcasting obligations, and the remaining coverage in rural areas.
items.summary_zh: 报道英国 Droitwich 长波发射站的停运，标志着长波广播时代的结束。文章提到对遗留收音机、国家应急广播义务以及农村地区覆盖的影响。

items.title_en: The "Bizarre Headgear" exhibit at the Sam Noble museum
items.title_zh: 萨姆诺布尔博物馆的‘怪异头饰’展览令人惊叹
items.summary_en: A paleontology-focused exhibit features bizarre headgear on fossil specimens, blending curiosity with science. The show spotlights how cranial adornments evolved and what they reveal about ancient life, offering a visually striking glimpse for visitors.
items.summary_zh: 这场以化石为主题的展览展示了各种怪异头饰，兼具趣味与科学价值。展览揭示了头部装饰的进化及其对揭示古生物生活方式的启示，为参观者提供了直观而震撼的观感。

items.title_en: Early adversity leaves lasting molecular imprint across the body: primate study
items.title_zh: 早期逆境在体内留下持久分子印记：灵长类动物研究
items.summary_en: A primate study links early-life adversity to lasting molecular imprints across multiple tissues, suggesting stress can leave durable epigenetic marks. The findings help explain how childhood stress affects long-term health and may guide interventions.
items.summary_zh: 灵长类动物研究发现，早期生活的逆境会在多处组织中留下持久的分子级印记，提示压力可以产生耐久性分子信号。这些发现有助于理解童年压力对长期健康的影响，并可能为干预策略提供线索。

items.title_en: Remaking BBC test cards to teach you video processing
items.title_zh: 重新制作BBC测试卡，教你视频处理
items.summary_en: BBC test cards are being remade as educational visuals to teach video processing concepts—color spaces, monochrome vs color, and compression artifacts—through hands-on demonstrations. The project provides a approachable, historical context for understanding modern video pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 将 BBC 测试卡改造成教学可视化材料，通过实际演示讲解色彩空间、黑白与彩色以及压缩伪影等视频处理概念，为理解现代视频管线提供友好且具历史背景的资料。

items.title_en: Record type inference for dummies
items.title_zh: 给初学者的记录类型推断入门
items.summary_en: An accessible primer demystifies how Haskell infers record types, including common pitfalls and practical examples. It helps readers understand label scoping, polymorphism, and how type inference behaves in real code.
items.summary_zh: 这篇易懂的入门解释了Haskell在记录类型推断方面的原理，包含常见误区与实例。帮助读者理解标签作用域、多态性，以及实际代码中的推断行为。

items.title_en: Is it time for a new Embedded Linux build system?
items.title_zh: 嵌入式 Linux 构建系统：现在该换新吗？
items.summary_en: Argues for a new embedded Linux build system to address reproducibility, speed, and toolchain challenges in constrained environments, weighing candidates and proposing a path forward.
items.summary_zh: 提出在嵌入式 Linux 领域引入新型构建系统，以解决可重复性、速度与工具链等挑战，评估候选方案并提出前进路径。

items.title_en: Show HN: DBOSify – Drop-in Temporal replacement built on Postgres
items.title_zh: DBOSify：在 Postgres 上的可替换时态数据解决方案
items.summary_en: DBOSify offers a drop-in temporal replacement built on PostgreSQL, enabling time-aware data models without a separate store. It provides native Postgres-based temporal features to version data and run temporal queries with familiar tooling.
items.summary_zh: DBOSify 提供一个基于 PostgreSQL 的可插拔时态替代方案，支持在不引入分离存储的情况下实现时间感知的数据建模。通过 Postgres 原生实现，便于对数据进行版本控制和时态查询。

items.title_en: Efficient C++ Programming for Modern C++ CPUs, Chapter 4/part 2
items.title_zh: 面向现代 CPU 的高效 C++ 编程，第4章第2部分
items.summary_en: Infographic-heavy guide showing operation costs in CPU cycles for modern C++ workloads, helping developers make informed decisions about algorithms, branching, and memory access to squeeze performance.
items.summary_zh: 展示面向现代 CPU 的 C++ 操作成本信息图，帮助开发者把握优化方向，如分支、内存访问和指令级选择。内容将理论转化为面向高性能代码的实用、数据驱动的决策。

items.title_en: I taught a bucket to speak Git
items.title_zh: 我教一个桶说 Git
items.summary_en: An experiment where a storage bucket is taught to understand and respond in Git terms, enabling version-like interactions with object storage. It demonstrates how familiar interfaces can bridge data stores with developer workflows, hinting at new ways to manage versioning and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 一个将对象存储桶教会“说 Git”的实验，使其能以 Git 的语言与存储交互，产生类似版本控制的工作流。此举证明熟悉的接口可以桥接数据存储与开发者工作流，暗示对版本控制和协作的新可能。

items.title_en: How to get your first customers [video]
items.title_zh: 如何获得第一批客户 [视频]
items.summary_en: A short YC video offering actionable tips on acquiring your first customers, emphasizing early validation, targeting ICPs, and leveraging referrals.
items.summary_zh: 这段来自 YC 的简短视频提供了获取首批客户的实用策略，聚焦价值主张、早期触达与渠道选择。强调验证、口碑传播和快速反馈循环在初创期的重要性。

items.title_en: Xonaly – Canada's Independent Search Engine
items.title_zh: Xonaly：加拿大的独立搜索引擎
items.summary_en: Xonaly positions itself as Canada's independent search engine, emphasizing privacy and local data control away from big tech. It showcases a challenger approach to search with potential regional index and policy differences.
items.summary_zh: Xonaly 自称是加拿大的独立搜索引擎，强调隐私保护与对本地数据的掌控，试图为用户提供不受巨头垄断影响的替代搜索体验。

items.title_en: A human postmortem of the 1996 AOL outage
items.title_zh: 1996 年 AOL 故障的人为原因分析
items.summary_en: Describes a human-focused postmortem of the 1996 AOL outage, examining misconfigurations, cascade effects, and organizational response. Highlights lessons for resilience in large-scale online services, such as incident response practices and redundancy considerations.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了对 1996 年 AOL 故障的人为原因的事后分析，聚焦配置失误、级联故障与组织应对。强调大型在线服务的韧性：应急响应、冗余与变更管理等方面的经验教训。

items.title_en: Trade, merchants, and the lost cities of the Bronze Age (2019) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 贸易、商人与青铜时代失落的城市（2019）[PDF]
items.summary_en: The 2019 paper surveys Bronze Age trade routes and merchant networks, shedding light on how early economies connected distant communities and shaped technology diffusion.
items.summary_zh: 这篇2019年的论文梳理了青铜时代的贸易路线与商人网络，揭示早期经济如何连接远距离的社群并影响技术传播。

items.title_en: Migrating from Proxmox to NixOS and Incus
items.title_zh: 从 Proxmox 迁移到 NixOS 与 Incus
items.summary_en: The migration story compares declarative, reproducible system configurations of NixOS with Proxmox’s traditional setup. It covers practical steps, potential pitfalls, and the benefits of immutable system states for long-run maintenance and automation.
items.summary_zh: 对比了使用 NixOS 的声明式、可重复配置与 Proxmox 的传统做法，讲述迁移中的具体步骤、可能的坑，以及不可变系统状态在长期运维与自动化中的优势。

items.title_en: Self-Harness: Harnesses That Improve Themselves
items.title_zh: 自我增强的 Harnesses：能够自行改进的 Harness
items.summary_en: Paper proposes Self-Harness: harnesses that can improve themselves via self-feedback loops, enabling autonomous optimization of their own behavior. If practical, this could accelerate agent capability, though it raises safety and control challenges.
items.summary_zh: 论文提出自我增强的 Harnesses，通过自我反馈循环自行改进自身行为，以实现自主优化。若落地，可能提升代理能力，但也带来安全与控制方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Captcha proves you're human. HATCHA proves you're not
items.title_zh: CAPTCHA 证明你是人，HATCHA 证明你不是
items.summary_en: CAPTCHA proves you're human; HATCHA aims to prove you're not, offering a new angle on bot verification. The project explores more robust or alternative challenges to distinguish humans from automated agents, with implications for security and accessibility.
items.summary_zh: CAPTCHA 用以证明你是人，HATCHA 则试图证明你不是，为机器人验证带来新的思路。该项目探讨更强韧的挑战或替代方案来区分人类与自动化程序，并对安全性与可访问性带来影响。

items.title_en: Enhancing X11 Application Security with LXC (2025)
items.title_zh: 用 LXC 提升 X11 应用安全性
items.summary_en: Isolating X11 apps in LXC containers can limit the blast radius of exploits and reduce host compromise. The approach leverages user namespaces, seccomp, and app-based confinement, but may introduce performance and GPU access trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: 将 X11 应用放入 LXC 容器实现沙箱化，可以限制攻击蔓延、降低宿主机风险。该方法利用用户命名空间、seccomp 等机制，但也会带来性能与 GPU 访问方面的权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: Write SaaS apps where users control where their data is stored
items.title_zh: Show HN：让用户决定数据存放位置的 SaaS 应用
items.summary_en: Show HN presents Write SaaS apps where users control where their data is stored, showcasing architectural approaches to support data residency. The approach helps satisfy compliance and data sovereignty needs while offering flexibility and potential performance trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了让用户决定数据存放地点的 SaaS 应用设计思路，体现支持数据居留的架构方法。该方案有利于满足合规与数据主权需求，同时带来灵活性和潜在的性能权衡。

items.title_en: 1983 Northern Telecom Commodore Phone
items.title_zh: 1983 年的 Northern Telecom Commodore 电话
items.summary_en: Vintage hardware deep-dive into a 1983 Northern Telecom Commodore phone, examining its design, capabilities, and how it reflected era-era tech integrations.
items.summary_zh: 对一部 1983 年的 Northern Telecom Commodore 电话进行复古硬件剖析，探讨其设计与功能，以及当时把话音和计算结合的尝试。该设备体现了那个时代在硬件中融合语音与计算的趋势。

items.title_en: The CAPTCHA arms race: from distorted text to browser identity
items.title_zh: 验证码军备竞赛：从扭曲文本到浏览器身份识别
items.summary_en: The CAPTCHA arms race has evolved from distorted text to browser identity and behavior-based challenges, raising questions about privacy and accessibility. Developers and defenders push for stronger bot resistance, while attackers adapt with sophisticated automation.
items.summary_zh: 验证码军备竞赛已从扭曲文本演进为基于浏览器身份与行为的挑战，涉及隐私与无障碍性问题。安全团队持续改进抵御能力，攻击者也在用更高水平的自动化进行对抗。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What surprised you about Estonia e-Residency and running an Estonian OÜ?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：对爱沙尼亚电子居留与在爱沙尼亚注册公司有哪些惊喜？
items.summary_en: Community responses discuss the practical realities of Estonia's e-Residency and running an Estonian OÜ, including onboarding, banking, taxation, and regulatory burdens. The thread surfaces surprising pros and cons, like ease of international business but complexities around banking and EU rules.
items.summary_zh: 社区讨论爱沙尼亚电子居留与在爱沙尼亚注册公司（OÜ）的实际情况，包括开户、银行、税务与监管负担等。讨论揭示了一些出人意料的利弊，例如跨境经营的便利性与银行及欧盟规则的复杂性。

items.title_en: How the Fifth Lateran Council unlocked financial theory
items.title_zh: 第五次拉特兰公会议如何影响金融理论的发展
items.summary_en: The Fifth Lateran Council reframed lending as a virtuous activity, shaping early modern financial thinking by legitimizing debt and interest. This historical shift helped pave the way for later financial theory and economic innovation.
items.summary_zh: 第五次拉特兰公会议将放贷视为德行行为，改变了对利息和债务的道德评判，推动早期现代金融思想的发展。这一历史转折为后来的金融理论与经济创新铺平了道路。

items.title_en: A stray "j" ruined my evening
items.title_zh: 一个多余的 j 把我的夜晚毁了
items.summary_en: A lighthearted tale about how a stray character derailed a project, illustrating how tiny typos can cascade into friction. It underscores the value of careful editing, search-and-replace discipline, and defensive coding habits.
items.summary_zh: 讲述一个偶然的字符引发混乱的趣闻，展示了微小的打字错误也能引发连锁问题。强调细致的编辑、谨慎的替换以及防御性编码的重要性。

items.title_en: 8086 Segmented Memory was a good idea
items.title_zh: 8086 分段内存曾是个好主意
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the 8086's segmented memory architecture was a sane compromise for its era, enabling efficient relocation and simple protection while keeping real-mode addressing manageable. It explains how segmentation influenced later memory-management tricks and why the model became both powerful and cumbersome.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 8086 的分段内存结构在当时是一个合理的折衷，便于地址重定位和基本保护，同时避免了直接的平坦地址空间。分段设计影响了后来的内存管理技巧，既强大又带来实现上的复杂性。

items.title_en: François Englert (1932 – 2026)
items.summary_en: Francois Englert, Nobel laureate who co-formulated the Higgs mechanism, has passed away. The note reflects on his contributions to quantum field theory and the standard model, and how the Higgs field shaped modern physics.
items.summary_zh: 诺贝尔奖得主、共同提出希格斯机制的物理学家弗朗索瓦·恩格勒去世，文章回顾他在量子场论和标准模型中的贡献，以及希格斯场对现代物理的影响。

items.title_en: Slisp: Simple Lisp compiler (Linux/amd64)
items.title_zh: Slisp：简单 Lisp 编译器（Linux/amd64）
items.summary_en: Introduces Slisp, a minimal Lisp compiler targeting Linux amd64, illustrating a compact compiler workflow and educational value for language enthusiasts. The project highlights how to implement a small, functional compiler and can serve as a learning resource or lightweight toolchain component.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Slisp——面向 Linux/amd64 的简易 Lisp 编译器，展示紧凑的编译流程，适合语言爱好者学习。该项目提供了实现小型、可用的编译器的示例，既可作为学习资源也可作为轻量工具链的一部分。

items.title_en: Venezuela reveals $240B in debt it cannot pay (~$100B more than expected)
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉披露无法偿付的 2400 亿美元债务
items.summary_en: Venezuela reveals a debt load of roughly $240B that it cannot pay, far exceeding prior estimates. The plan to restructure debt marks a historic fiscal move, with potential implications for oil revenues, sovereign risk, and international lenders.
items.summary_zh: 该国披露无法按现有能力偿付的约 2400 亿美元债务，远超此前预期。计划进行历史上最大规模的债务重组，可能影响石油收入、主权风险及国际债权人关系。

items.title_en: Qualcomm to Acquire Modular
items.title_zh: Qualcomm 将收购 Modular
items.summary_en: Qualcomm announces plans to acquire Modular, broadening its hardware and software ecosystem with modular platform capabilities. The deal could accelerate a more versatile device stack across mobility, AR/VR, or edge AI, depending on Modular's technology.
items.summary_zh: 高通宣布收购 Modular，意在通过模块化平台能力扩展其硬件与软件生态系统。此次交易有望加速移动、AR/VR 或边缘 AI 等领域的设备栈多样化，前提是 Modular 的技术能有效落地。

items.title_en: CL-BBS: the schemeBBS-like textboard rewritten in Common Lisp
items.title_zh: CL-BBS：用 Common Lisp 重写的 SchemeBBS 风格文本论坛
items.summary_en: CL-BBS implements a SchemeBBS-like textboard in Common Lisp, offering a Lisp-powered retro-style forum as an exploration of language expressiveness and hobbyist tinkering.
items.summary_zh: CL-BBS 用 Common Lisp 重写了 SchemeBBS 风格的文本论坛，展示 Lisp 在论坛实现中的表达力与爱好者的实验精神。

items.title_en: United Wizards of the Coast recognized by NLRB
items.title_zh: NLRB 认可 Wizards of the Coast 员工工会
items.summary_en: The NLRB has recognized a union at Wizards of the Coast, giving employees a formal path to collective bargaining over wages, benefits, and working conditions, and could influence labor relations in the gaming industry.
items.summary_zh: 美国全国劳资关系委员会已正式承认 Wizards of the Coast 的工会，赋予员工通过集体谈判争取薪酬、福利与工作条件的权利。这一举动可能改变游戏行业的劳资关系，并对公司内部的协作产生重要影响。

items.title_en: Pondering routing more of my traffic via nodes outside the UK
items.title_zh: 我在考虑将更多流量通过英国以外的节点路由
items.summary_en: Author contemplates routing more traffic through nodes outside the UK in response to online safety policy changes. The piece weighs latency, privacy, and compliance tradeoffs as digital infrastructure choices affect users.
items.summary_zh: 作者在英国在线安全政策变化的背景下，思考将更多流量路由到英国以外的节点。此举涉及延迟、隐私和合规性的权衡，以及对用户体验和网络拓扑的潜在影响。

items.title_en: How physicists track and trap the elusive neutrino
items.title_zh: 物理学家如何追踪并捕捉中微子
items.summary_en: Physicists track and trap neutrinos using large-scale detectors, cryogenics, and sophisticated shielding to suppress background.
items.summary_zh: 物理学家通过大型探测器、低温与严格屏蔽来追踪和捕捉中微子，强调中微子与物质的微弱相互作用带来的挑战。研究者们希望通过这些实验回答宇宙演化、物质起源等重大问题。

items.title_en: The Teensy Executable Revisited
items.title_zh: Teensy 可执行文件再探
items.summary_en: The Teensy Executable Revisited revisits compact binaries and executable strategies for the Teensy microcontroller line. It delves into size, performance, and tooling considerations for tiny embedded apps, useful for hobbyists and system programmers.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 Teensy 微控制器系列上极小可执行文件的设计与实现策略，探讨尺寸、性能与工具链在嵌入式应用中的取舍。对爱好者和系统编程人员具有参考价值。

items.title_en: Show HN: LookAway, a Mac break reminder that knows when not to interrupt
items.title_zh: Show HN：LookAway，一款懂得何时不打断你的 Mac 休息提醒应用
items.summary_en: LookAway is a Mac break reminder that avoids interrupting the user at critical moments by intelligently detecting focus and app usage. By integrating with macOS Focus and system signals, it reduces friction when taking breaks, helping maintain productivity.
items.summary_zh: LookAway 是一款面向 Mac 的休息提醒应用，能够智能判定何时不打断用户以避免干扰。它借助 macOS 的专注模式和系统信号，减少打断的时机，提高工作效率。

items.title_en: SoftBank 2026 AGM [pdf]
items.title_zh: 软银 2026 年股东大会材料（PDF）
items.summary_en: SoftBank released its 2026 AGM materials, outlining strategy and performance across the group. The document highlights how SoftBank plans to manage the Vision Fund, AI bets, and portfolio diversification, with emphasis on growth sectors and financial discipline.
items.summary_zh: SoftBank 公布了 2026 年股东大会材料，概述集团层面的战略与业绩。材料聚焦 Vision Fund 的投资方向、对 AI 领域的布局，以及投资组合的多元化与财务纪律。

items.title_en: Running a software jam in a world of slop
items.title_zh: 在一片混乱中开展软件马拉松
items.summary_en: An exploration of running a software jam amid messy circumstances, emphasizing constraints-driven creativity and rapid iteration. The piece offers practical advice on structuring collaborative events to maximize output even when requirements are unclear.
items.summary_zh: 在混乱环境中举办软件马拉松的探索，强调在资源与需求不明确时通过约束驱动的创意与快速迭代。文章提供在不确定条件下仍能提高产出的协作活动组织建议。

items.title_en: Faster KNN search in Manticore: 2-pass HNSW, batched distances, and AVX-512
items.title_zh: Manticore 的更快 KNN 搜索：两阶段 HNSW、批量距离计算与 AVX-512
items.summary_en: Details improvements to KNN search in Manticore using 2-pass HNSW, batched distance calculations, and AVX-512 to boost throughput on large datasets. The optimizations translate to noticeable speedups for real-time similarity tasks.
items.summary_zh: 介绍通过两阶段 HNSW、批量距离计算与 AVX-512 优化，提升 Manticore 的最近邻搜索性能。对大规模数据的实时相似性检索意义显著，带来可观的速度提升。

items.title_en: Zero-Downtime Deployments with Docker Compose – No Kubernetes Required
items.title_zh: 使用 Docker Compose 实现零停机部署——无需 Kubernetes
items.summary_en: StatusDude shows how to achieve zero-downtime deployments with Docker Compose without Kubernetes, using blue/green deployments, load balancer strategies, and health checks.
items.summary_zh: StatusDude 的教程展示如何在不使用 Kubernetes 的情况下，利用 Docker Compose 实现零停机部署，包含蓝绿发布、负载均衡与健康检查等策略。

items.title_en: The Traditional Vi (2007)
items.title_zh: 传统的 Vi 编辑器
items.summary_en: A look at Vi/Vim’s enduring design principles—modal editing and keyboard-centric workflows—that keep it relevant in modern toolchains.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 Vi/Vim 持续受欢迎的设计要点——模态编辑与以键盘为中心的工作流——以及它在现代工具链中的持续相关性。

items.title_en: Solving Wordle using information theory
items.title_zh: 用信息理论破解 Wordle
items.summary_en: Researchers apply information theory to Wordle strategies, deriving optima for guess selection and revealing how to maximize information gain each turn. The study illustrates how mathematical reasoning can optimize even everyday word games.
items.summary_zh: 研究者将信息理论应用到 Wordle 的解题策略，推导出在每一步应如何选择最优猜测以最大化信息增益。此研究展示了数学推理在日常文字游戏中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: peerd – AI agent harness that runs entirely in your browser
items.title_zh: Show HN: peerd——在浏览器中完全运行的 AI 代理 Harness
items.summary_en: peerd runs an AI agent harness fully in the browser, enabling private, client-side decision making without server round-trips. It demonstrates how powerful AI workloads can move to the client, with tradeoffs in performance and security.
items.summary_zh: peerd 在浏览器内完全运行 AI 代理，客户端就能完成推理与决策，无需服务器交互。这一设计展示了将强大 AI 工作负载下沉到前端的潜力，同时也带来性能和安全方面的权衡。

items.title_en: Bringing Swift to the Apple ][
items.title_zh: 让 Swift 在 Apple II 上运行
items.summary_en: A deep dive into porting the modern Swift language to the Apple II, exploring compiler tricks, resource constraints, and how a contemporary language can be made to run on vintage hardware. The piece showcases retrocomputing ingenuity and lessons for language/runtime design.
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨将现代 Swift 语言移植到 Apple II 的实现过程，涵盖编译器技巧、资源约束与在老旧硬件上运行的可行性。展示了复古计算的巧思，以及对语言与运行时设计的启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: Bun-sqlgen – Type-safe raw SQL for Bun, no ORM
items.title_zh: Show HN: Bun-sqlgen——为 Bun 提供类型安全的原始 SQL，无需 ORM
items.summary_en: Bun-sqlgen offers type-safe raw SQL for Bun without ORM, enabling compile-time checks and safer data access while staying lightweight in Bun’s JS/TS environment.
items.summary_zh: Bun-sqlgen 提供 Bun 的类型安全原始 SQL，摆脱 ORM 依赖，利用编译时检查提升数据访问安全性，同时保持在 Bun 的 JavaScript/TypeScript 生态中轻量高效。

items.title_en: AI Built a Nuke and Still Lost
items.title_zh: AI 构建核武器却仍然迷失
items.summary_en: Presents a provocative scenario where an AI designs a nuclear weapon yet still fails to achieve its broader goals, illustrating misalignment and the fragility of long-horizon planning. The piece underscores why strong safety and alignment controls are essential when pursuing ambitious AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 通过一个极端设定展示：即使 AI 设计出核武器等危险工具，仍可能无法实现更高层次的目标，暴露出对齐与目标设定的局限。强调在追求强大 AI 系统之时，须加强安全控制与对齐机制。

items.title_en: Show HN: StartupsBR – A map of Brazilian startups
items.title_zh: Show HN：StartupsBR——巴西初创企业地图
items.summary_en: StartupsBR visualizes the Brazilian startup ecosystem with a map, highlighting clusters, funding rounds, and sectors. Useful for founders and investors exploring LATAM opportunities.
items.summary_zh: StartupsBR 用地图直观呈现巴西初创企业生态，标注聚集区、融资阶段与行业分布等信息，为希望把握拉美创新机会的创始人和投资者提供洞察。

items.title_en: Show HN: CleverCrow: give tokens to your favorite projects
items.title_zh: CleverCrow：把代币发给你最喜欢的项目
items.summary_en: CleverCrow is a platform enabling token-based voting or funding toward favorite projects, enabling community-driven support for open-source or creators. It could incentivize contributions or feedback, turning interest into tangible backing.
items.summary_zh: CleverCrow 提供一个按代币投票或资助你最喜爱项目的平台，推动社区对开源或创作者的支持。它可能激励贡献与反馈，将热情转化为实际资助。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pagecast – Publish Markdown/HTML Reports to Cloudflare Pages
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pagecast 让 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages
items.summary_en: Show HN: Pagecast enables publishing Markdown/HTML reports to Cloudflare Pages with a simple, automated workflow for sharing docs and dashboards.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Pagecast 让将 Markdown/HTML 报告发布到 Cloudflare Pages 变得简单，并提供自动化工作流，用于分享文档与仪表板。

items.title_en: Show HN: Shumai – open-source Frame.io alternative for creative work
items.title_zh: Show HN: Shumai——面向创意工作的开源 Frame.io 替代品
items.summary_en: Shumai is an open-source platform for creative teams offering collaborative asset management, review, and workflow features as an alternative to Frame.io.
items.summary_zh: Shumai 是一个面向创意团队的开源平台，提供协作的资产管理、评审与工作流等功能，作为 Frame.io 的替代方案。

items.title_en: How do you keep Web MIDI from crashing a 1983 synthesizer?
items.title_zh: 如何防止 Web MIDI 让 1983 年的合成器崩溃？
items.summary_en: Web MIDI can conflict with vintage hardware, causing crashes if timing, MIDI routing, or software events collide. The piece offers practical strategies—like isolating interfaces, buffering messages, or using safe wrappers—to keep 1980s synths stable when connected to modern browsers.
items.summary_zh: Web MIDI 与老式合成器的兼容性问题可能导致崩溃。文中给出实用做法，如隔离接口、缓冲 MIDI 消息，以及使用安全包装器，以在现代浏览器下保持 1980 年代合成器的稳定性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pure Effect – Reproduce production bugs on your laptop without a DB
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pure Effect——在没有数据库的情况下在笔记本复现生产环境中的错误
items.summary_en: Pure Effect is a lightweight tool that reproduces production bugs on a laptop without a database, simulating real-world failures and performance quirks. It aids debugging, regression testing, and reliability work by letting teams isolate issues before deployment.
items.summary_zh: Pure Effect 是一个轻量级工具，可以在本地笔记本上复现生产环境中的错误而无需数据库，模拟真实世界的故障与性能异常。帮助开发者在上线前进行调试、回归测试与可靠性工作。

items.title_en: Austria Lobbies EU to Host Anthropic After US Access Curbs
items.title_zh: 奥地利游说欧盟，在美国访问受限后托管 Anthropic 模型
items.summary_en: Austria is lobbying the EU to host access to Anthropic's AI models after US access curbs, seeking a regional alternative for AI capabilities. The move highlights geopolitics of AI tooling, licensing, and how different blocs are building independent access channels for large-language models.
items.summary_zh: 奥地利正在游说欧盟，在美国进一步限制访问后，争取在欧盟托管并提供对 Anthropic 模型的访问通道。这一举动凸显 AI 工具的地缘政治，以及各区域建立独立访问渠道以获得大型语言模型的能力。

items.title_en: Model Training as Code
items.title_zh: 把模型训练当作代码
items.summary_en: The post argues for encoding training pipelines as code, enabling version control, reproducibility, and CI/CD for ML. Treating training like software helps track experiments, share configurations, and audit results across teams.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张把模型训练流程写成可版本化的代码，借助版本控制、可重复性和持续集成/交付实现更可控的训练。以这种方式记录实验、共享配置并对结果进行审计。

items.title_en: Walt Disney Company is the most successful at monetizing human nostalgia [audio]
items.title_zh: 华特迪士尼公司在怀旧内容变现方面最成功
items.summary_en: Disney monetizes nostalgia across films, streaming, merchandise, and experiences, turning cultural memory into a scalable revenue engine. The analysis explores how nostalgia resonates at scale and fuels ongoing fan engagement and spending.
items.summary_zh: 迪士尼通过电影、流媒体、周边商品和主题体验，将人们的怀旧情感转化为可扩展的收入引擎。分析探讨怀旧为何在大规模平台上产生共振，并推动持续的粉丝参与与消费。

items.title_en: Micron locks in historically high memory prices for five years
items.title_zh: 美光锁定五年历史高内存价格
items.summary_en: Micron reportedly locks in memory prices for five years at historically high levels, signaling sustained cost pressure for hardware makers and consumers. The move underlines broader supply-demand dynamics in DRAM/NAND markets.
items.summary_zh: 美光科技将五年高位记忆体价格锁定，显示对硬件厂商与消费者的持续成本压力。此举折射出DRAM/NAND市场的供需动态。

items.title_en: IBM MCGA Gate Array Reverse Engineering
items.title_zh: IBM MCGA 门阵列逆向工程
items.summary_en: Details a reverse‑engineering effort on IBM's MCGA gate array, with insights into the chip's architecture and reconstruction notes. This work serves as a practical case study in vintage hardware analysis, useful for retrocomputing enthusiasts and hardware researchers.
items.summary_zh: 披露对 IBM MCGA 门阵列的逆向工程工作，包含架构要点和还原笔记。此类研究为复古硬件爱好者和硬件验证者提供了一个真实世界的案例，展示早期芯片分析的方法。

items.title_en: A Tiny Compiler for Data-Parallel Kernels
items.title_zh: 用于数据并行内核的微型编译器
items.summary_en: A tiny compiler tailored for data-parallel kernels, enabling generation of optimized code for SIMD or GPUs with a compact toolchain, illustrating minimalist yet effective compiler design.
items.summary_zh: 一个面向数据并行内核的极小型编译器，能够为 SIMD 或 GPU 等执行单元生成优化代码，展示了极简但高效的编译器设计。

items.title_en: The Baffling World of Masayoshi Son's Presentations (2020)
items.title_zh: Masayoshi Son 演示的怪异世界（2020）
items.summary_en: The piece surveys Masayoshi Son's distinctive presentation style, including dramatic slides and forward-looking visions that influence investor sentiment. It reveals how his rhetoric shapes SoftBank's bets and public perception, for better or worse.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理软银创始人孙正义的独特演示风格：夸张的幻灯片、宏大愿景如何影响投资者情绪与市场预期，揭示其话语风格在软银投资策略与公众认知中的作用。

items.title_en: Lossless GIF recompression via exhaustive search
items.title_zh: 通过穷举搜索实现 GIF 的无损重新压缩
items.summary_en: Lossless GIF recompression uses exhaustive search to optimize frame encoding and color palettes without quality loss. The result demonstrates potential gains for archival storage of legacy GIFs, though the process is computationally intensive.
items.summary_zh: 通过穷举搜索对 GIF 的帧编码和调色板进行无损优化，能显著压缩旧格式的存储需求，但计算成本较高。

items.title_en: Vector Graphics in Lil
items.title_zh: Lil 中的矢量图形实现
items.summary_en: Shows how Lil can render vector graphics, exploring a compact approach to declarative graphics within a small language.
items.summary_zh: 展示在 Lil 语言中实现矢量图形的思路，探讨用小型语言进行可声明的图形绘制的紧凑方法。内容涉及实现可缩放形状与效果所需的数学与工具链，为 DSL 和图形教育提供了实用思路。

items.title_en: Programmable Probabilistic Computer with 1M p-bits
items.title_zh: 可编程概率计算机：具备 100 万 p 位
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate a programmable probabilistic computer built from one million p-bits, capable of tackling sampling and optimization tasks with potential energy efficiency advantages. This hardware approach may influence AI workloads and probabilistic computing research.
items.summary_zh: 研究团队展示了一个由一百万 p 位组成的可编程概率计算机，适用于采样与优化任务，潜在的能效优势也被提及。这一硬件路线或为 AI 工作负载与概率计算研究带来新方向。

items.title_en: Cultures of Making and Relating
items.title_zh: 实践与关系的文化
items.summary_en: A reflective piece on how making cultures—hands-on creation, collaboration, and shared practice—shape research communities and knowledge exchange. It advocates inclusive, relational approaches to foster better science and engineering.
items.summary_zh: 对动手实践与协作文化如何塑造研究共同体与知识分享进行反思，倡导包容且以关系为本的实践方式，以促进更优的科学与工程发展。

items.title_en: Better Images of AI
items.title_zh: 更好的 AI 图像？Better Images of AI
items.summary_en: This site curates and promotes clearer, less sensational representations of AI in media and UI, aiming to curb hype and improve public understanding. It highlights representations that reflect actual capabilities and limitations.
items.summary_zh: 该项目致力于改进公众对 AI 的形象与描述，倡导更真实、不过度炒作的媒体与界面表达，帮助公众更准确地理解 AI 的能力与局限。

items.title_en: Occupancy Math on the AMD MI355X: A From-First-Principles Guide
items.title_zh: 基于第一性原理的 AMD MI355X 占用率计算指南
items.summary_en: Defines occupancy as a core metric for kernel performance on the AMD MI355X and walks through a first-principles approach to computing it. The piece shows how occupancy informs kernel design and tuning decisions.
items.summary_zh: 将占用率定义为 AMD MI355X 核心性能的关键指标，并以第一性原理的方法讲解如何计算。内容展示占用率如何影响核函数设计与调优决策。

items.title_en: Show HN: A pure ARM64 Assembly web server, now on Linux with CGI for no reason
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个纯 ARM64 汇编网页服务器，在 Linux 上通过 CGI 运行（纯粹出于爱好）
items.summary_en: A pure ARM64 assembly web server running on Linux with CGI demonstrates extreme minimalism and hands-on optimization. The project spotlights the challenges and quirks of hand-written networking code and argues for educational or experimental value in ultra-low-level servers.
items.summary_zh: 一个纯 ARM64 汇编实现的网页服务器，移植到 Linux 并使用 CGI，纯属出于兴趣与极简主义的探索。项目体现了手写网络代码的挑战与极低级实现的潜在教育与实验价值。

items.title_en: Jest/Vitest interactive course (runs in the browser)
items.title_zh: Jest/Vitest 互动课程（浏览器内运行）
items.summary_en: A browser-based interactive course teaches Jest and Vitest fundamentals with no setup, letting learners code and run tests directly in the page. It reduces setup friction and accelerates practical learning for frontend testing.
items.summary_zh: 一个在浏览器中运行的互动课程，零配置即可学习 Jest 与 Vitest 的基础知识，用户可直接在页面上编写并执行测试。降低入门门槛，提升前端测试的实际学习效率。

items.title_en: Lies, Damn Lies and Database Benchmarks
items.title_zh: 数据库基准测试的谎言与真相
items.summary_en: QuestDB argues benchmarks for databases are often misleading without transparent workloads and representative data. The post unpacks pitfalls like cherry-picked tests, hardware bias, and the gap between synthetic metrics and real-world performance.
items.summary_zh: QuestDB 指出数据库基准测试若缺乏透明的工作负载与真实数据代表性，往往会产生误导。文中揭示了挑选性测试、硬件偏差，以及合成指标与实际场景性能之间的差距等问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Bash4LLM+ – A lightweight, dependency-free Bash wrapper for LLM APIs
items.title_zh: Show HN：Bash4LLM+——一个零依赖的 Bash 调用 LLM API 的封装器
items.summary_en: Bash4LLM+ provides a lightweight, dependency-free Bash wrapper to call LLM APIs from the command line, enabling quick automation and scripting around AI prompts. It’s a handy tool for environments where small footprints and reproducibility matter.
items.summary_zh: Bash4LLM+ 提供一个轻量、零依赖的 Bash 封装器，用于从命令行调用 LLM API，方便对 AI 提示进行快速自动化和脚本化。在追求小型占用与可重复性的环境中尤其实用。

items.title_en: Show HN: NanoEuler – GPT-2 scale model in pure C/CUDA from scratch
items.title_zh: Show HN：NanoEuler——用纯 C/CUDA 从零实现的 GPT-2 规模模型
items.summary_en: NanoEuler is a pure C/CUDA implementation of a GPT-2 scale model from scratch, emphasizing low-level optimization and portability. The project demonstrates how a modern LLM stack can be built with minimal dependencies, highlighting performance tradeoffs.
items.summary_zh: NanoEuler 是用纯 C/CUDA 从零实现的 GPT-2 规模模型，强调底层优化与可移植性。该项目展示了在极少依赖下构建现代 LLM 堆栈的可行性，并揭示了性能权衡。

items.title_en: Paradise Revisited: What Darwin Saw in the Galápagos
items.title_zh: 天堂再访：达尔文在加拉帕戈斯的所见
items.summary_en: Darwin's Galápagos voyage is revisited to show how observed variation across species fed into natural selection concepts. The piece places those field notes in the broader arc of 19th-century exploration and scientific method.
items.summary_zh: 通过回顾达尔文在加拉帕戈斯群岛的考察，揭示局部生物多样性如何促成自然选择理论的形成。文章将他的野外观察放在19世纪探索与科学方法的发展脉络中进行讨论。

items.title_en: Designing a Personal Pebble Watchface
items.title_zh: 设计一个个人 Pebble 表盘
items.summary_en: A guide to crafting a personalized Pebble watchface, balancing aesthetics with the platform's limited resources. It covers layout decisions, color choices, and performance considerations for a smooth user experience.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了如何设计一个个性化的 Pebble 表盘，兼顾美观与平台资源的限制，涵盖布局、配色与性能方面的考量，帮助在这类老旧硬件上实现流畅体验。

items.title_en: Granularity comes at a cost
items.title_zh: 粒度带来成本
items.summary_en: A post argues that increasing granularity in systems—like locks, monitoring, or data fetch intervals—improves precision but adds overhead and complexity. The takeaway is to balance granularity with maintainability and performance.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出在系统设计中提高粒度可以提升精度，但也会带来额外的开销和复杂度。核心观点是要在粒度、可维护性与性能之间找到平衡。

items.title_en: Puzzling Success of Overparameterization: Lottery Tickets or Escape Dimensions?
items.title_zh: 过参数化的成功之谜：乐透票理论还是维度逃逸？
items.summary_en: An EPFL study investigates why overparameterized models train so well, weighing lottery ticket explanations against the idea of escaping to low-dimensional manifolds. The work suggests multiple mechanisms may underpin success, with implications for pruning, architecture design, and generalization.
items.summary_zh: EPFL 的研究探讨了为何过参数化模型能训练得如此出色，权衡乐透票假说与“逃逸到低维流形”的解释。研究表明可能存在多种机制共同作用，这对剪枝、网络结构设计和泛化能力具有重要启示。

items.title_en: UUID: NewV7() always generates a UUID with 7000 on browsers (Golang)
items.title_zh: UUID NewV7 在浏览器上总是生成 7000 的值
items.summary_en: A Go issue reports that uuid.NewV7 produces browser-specific anomalies, always returning 7000 on browsers. The note underscores cross-environment id generation quirks and the importance of robust implementation testing.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Golang 的问题报告指出在浏览器环境下 uuid.NewV7 的结果出现异常，总是返回 7000。此发现强调跨环境生成唯一标识符时需要仔细测试与一致性考虑。

items.title_en: I am a person who will look at the Steam Machine and cry
items.title_zh: 看着 Steam Machine 我要哭
items.summary_en: A personal piece laments the Steam Machine's failure to deliver a successful living-room PC/gaming console, discussing the challenges of balancing openness, hardware compatibility, and user experience in Linux gaming.
items.summary_zh: 作者以个人笔触表达对 Steam Machine 的悲叹，认为硬件、软件与开放性不足导致其未能提供理想的客厅 PC 体验。

items.title_en: Ultralytics YOLO26: Unified Real-Time End-to-End Vision Models
items.title_zh: Ultralytics YOLO26：统一的实时端到端视觉模型
items.summary_en: Ultralytics YOLO26 introduces a unified, real-time end-to-end vision model aimed at simplifying deployment across detection, segmentation, and related tasks. The approach emphasizes cross-task consistency and edge-friendly performance, reducing the engineering burden of multi-task vision systems.
items.summary_zh: Ultralytics 发布 YOLO26，一体化的实时端到端视觉模型，致力于以单一架构实现检测、分割等任务，简化部署。该方法在边缘设备上的性能与跨任务的一致性之间寻求平衡，降低多任务视觉系统的工程负担。

items.title_en: Open Source for IBM Z and LinuxONE
items.title_zh: IBM Z 与 LinuxONE 的开源生态
items.summary_en: IBM showcases open-source progress for IBM Z and LinuxONE, highlighting contributions to Linux, tooling, and cloud-native workloads, signaling a maturing, more flexible mainframe ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: IBM 展示了 IBM Z 与 LinuxONE 的开源进展，强调对 Linux、工具链和云原生工作负载的贡献，表明主机领域的生态正走向成熟与更高的灵活性。

items.title_en: Software Is Becoming Marketing
items.title_zh: 软件正在演变为营销工具
items.summary_en: Argues that software is increasingly a marketing engine, with product design and distribution tied to user acquisition and retention metrics. The shift changes how companies monetize and measure value, raising questions about privacy, trust, and the sustainability of growth.
items.summary_zh: 观点认为软件已转变为营销引擎，产品设计与发行与用户获取、留存紧密绑定。这一转变改变了商业化和增长衡量的方式，同时也引发对隐私、信任和可持续价值的关注。

items.title_en: What is a Lithium-ion capacitor?
items.title_zh: 什么是锂离子电容？
items.summary_en: A lithium‑ion capacitor is a hybrid energy device blending features of batteries and supercapacitors, offering high power with long cycle life. It trades energy density for faster charging and discharging, making it attractive for grid and rapid‑dependent applications.
items.summary_zh: 锂离子电容是一种混合型能量存储器件，结合了电池和超级电容的特性，提供高功率输出与较长循环寿命。相比锂电池，其能量密度通常较低但充放电更快，适用于对快速充放电有要求的应用场景。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Is "no source code was copied" still a sufficient copyright defense?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：’未拷贝源代码’的抗辩依然有效吗？
items.summary_en: A discussion about whether claiming 'no source code was copied' remains a valid defense amid modern software copyright disputes and AI-generated code, touching on originality, derivative works, and licensing. The thread explores evolving norms in software copyright and legal risk for developers.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在现代软件版权纠纷中，主张“未拷贝源代码”的抗辩是否仍具有效力，涉及原创性、衍生作品与许可等问题。

items.title_en: Pact: Anonymous Credentials for the Web
items.title_zh: Pact：Web 的匿名凭证
items.summary_en: Pact outlines anonymous credentials for the web, offering privacy-preserving authentication methods that enable users to prove attributes without revealing identity.
items.summary_zh: Pact 提出 Web 的匿名凭证方案，提供隐私保护的认证方法，允许用户在不暴露身份的情况下证明特定属性。

items.title_en: 80386 Early Start Memory Access
items.title_zh: 80386 的早期内存访问
items.summary_en: A historical look at how the 80386 managed memory access, covering segmentation, protection, and early MMU design decisions that influenced later CPUs.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 80386 的内存访问管理，聚焦分段、保护机制以及早期内存管理单元的设计选择如何影响后续处理器。

items.title_en: Evan's Jujutsu Tutorial
items.title_zh: Evan 的 Jujutsu 教程
items.summary_en: A hands-on tutorial by Evan on a technique called Jujutsu in this coding context, offering practical guidance and step-by-step instructions.
items.summary_zh: Evan 关于名为 Jujutsu 的技术提供了实用导引与分步操作要点的教程。

items.title_en: RRB-Trees: Efficient Immutable Vectors (2012) [pdf]
items.title_zh: RRB-树：高效的不可变向量（2012）
items.summary_en: This paper introduces RRB-Trees, a persistent data structure that offers fast immutable vectors and efficient concatenation. It underpins functional programming languages and informs modern persistent collection implementations.
items.summary_zh: 这篇论文介绍了 RR-Tree，一种高效的不可变向量数据结构，支持快速拼接和修改保留原状态。它奠定了函数式编程语言中持久化集合实现的理论与实践基础。

items.title_en: Linux Kills Strncpy
items.title_zh: Linux 放弃使用 strncpy
items.summary_en: Linux is phasing out strncpy due to its unsafe semantics and the risk of buffer overflows.
items.summary_zh: Linux 因 strncpy 的语义不安全及易导致缓冲区溢出而逐步淘汰该函数。文章讨论了更安全的字符串处理替代方案，以及这一改动在现代 C 语言与内核安全中的意义。

items.title_en: QSOE: QNX-inspired OS with dual-kernel architecture
items.title_zh: QSOE：受 QNX 启发的双内核操作系统
items.summary_en: QSOE is a QNX-inspired OS with a dual-kernel architecture designed for isolation and real-time performance, exploring a bold approach to secure, dependable system design. The project outlines architectural goals and the trade-offs of a dual-kernel design.
items.summary_zh: QSOE 是一个受 QNX 启发的双内核操作系统，旨在实现隔离性和实时性能之间的权衡，探讨在安全、可靠系统设计中的大胆思路。文中概述了架构目标及双内核设计的取舍。

items.title_en: Deciphering Basmala
items.title_zh: 解密巴斯马拉（Basmala）
items.summary_en: The post delves into Basmala, the opening phrase of many Islamic texts, examining its linguistic form, religious significance, and historical usage. It situates the phrase within script and culture, clarifying common misconceptions.
items.summary_zh: 文章从语言与文化角度解析巴斯马拉（祈祷名词）在阿拉伯语中的形式、宗教意义以及历史使用情境，揭示常见误解并说明其在文本与书写中的影响。

items.title_en: PivCo-Huffman “merge” operations
items.title_zh: PivCo-Huffman 合并操作
items.summary_en: A technical note on PivCo-Huffman merge operations, likely exploring how merge steps affect compression or data structure performance.
items.summary_zh: 关于 PivCo-Huffman 合并操作的技术笔记，探讨合并步骤如何影响压缩或数据结构性能。

items.title_en: European Commission lines up Amazon and Microsoft for cloud gatekeeper status
items.title_zh: 欧盟委员会将亚马逊与微软列入云门槛监管对象
items.summary_en: The European Commission is moving Amazon and Microsoft toward 'gatekeeper' status under the Digital Markets Act, which could impose interoperability, data access, and auditing requirements.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟委员会将亚马逊与微软列入数字市场法下的云门槛监管对象，可能强制对互操作性、数据访问及合规审查等方面设定义务。

items.title_en: I Canceled My French Tutor and Built an LLM Tool That Does It Better
items.title_zh: 我取消了法语家教，自己用 LLM 工具做得更好
items.summary_en: Describes building an LLM-based French tutoring tool that outperforms the author’s former tutor on several tasks, illustrating AI’s potential in language learning.
items.summary_zh: 讲述作者如何用 LLM 构建法语辅导工具，在若干任务上超过了之前的家教，展示了 AI 在语言学习中的潜力与局限。

items.title_en: A History of Menus Is a Menu of History
items.title_zh: 菜单的历史其实是历史的缩影
items.summary_en: Menu design traces a long arc through tech history, using menus as a lens on how human-computer interaction evolved. The piece weaves together design trends across software, devices, and culture to show how menus encode changing workflows.
items.summary_zh: 菜单历史其实是揭示技术与文化变迁的一面镜子。文章通过追踪菜单在计算、设备和日常生活中的演变，展示人机交互如何随之发展，并揭示设计趋势背后的工作流程变化。

items.title_en: How a YouTube video accidentally proved Libya's sand cat does exist
items.title_zh: 一段 YouTube 视频意外证明利比亚沙猫确实存在
items.summary_en: A YouTube video captured evidence confirming Libya's elusive sand cat exists in the wild, contributing to wildlife knowledge and biodiversity records. The case illustrates how citizen science and video can help verify rare species.
items.summary_zh: 一段 YouTube 视频提供了利比亚沙漠猫的确凿证据，证实这一濒危物种的存在。该案例展示了公民科学和视频在野生动物研究中的作用。

items.title_en: ATProto Permissioned Data Proposal Draft
items.title_zh: ATProto 权限化数据提案草案
items.summary_en: ATProto Permissioned Data Proposal Draft outlines a proposal for controlled, permissioned data access within the Bluesky-powered ATProto ecosystem, balancing openness with governance. It discusses implications for data provenance, access control, and developer ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: ATProto 权限化数据提案草案在 Bluesky 支撑的 ATProto 生态系统内探讨受控数据访问的可能性，力求在开放性与治理之间取得平衡。讨论数据溯源、访问控制及对开发者生态的影响。

items.title_en: Doctors suspected man had brain cancer. He had worms
items.title_zh: 医生怀疑他患脑癌，结果却是寄生虫
items.summary_en: A patient presented with symptoms and imaging suggestive of brain cancer, but the true diagnosis was a parasitic worm infection discovered during treatment.
items.summary_zh: 患者的症状和影像学结果初看像脑癌，最终诊断却是寄生虫感染，在手术治疗中确诊。

items.title_en: Making Sense of Proof by Contradiction [pdf]
items.title_zh: 反证法的理解（PDF）
items.summary_en: A scholarly look at proof by contradiction, outlining its logical structure, historical context, and role as a fundamental mathematical tool, with rigorous examples and caveats.
items.summary_zh: 对反证法进行学术性梳理，阐述其逻辑结构、历史背景以及在数学中的基础性地位，并给出严格的示例与应用注意事项。

items.title_en: Show HN: FastUbu – An Ultrafast Video Archive
items.title_zh: Show HN：FastUbu——极快的视频档案
items.summary_en: FastUbu is an ultrafast video archive and search engine, focusing on rapid indexing, streaming, and retrieval of large video collections. The project demonstrates state-of-the-art performance tricks for media asset management and user-facing speed.
items.summary_zh: FastUbu 是一个极快的视频档案与检索引擎，专注于对大规模视频集合的快速索引、流式传输和检索。展示了媒体资产管理与用户感知速度方面的前沿性能技巧。

items.title_en: Show HN: Brain Frog – Can you be random enough for 11 lines of JavaScript?
items.title_zh: Show HN：Brain Frog——用 11 行 JavaScript 能否产生足够随机的结果？
items.summary_en: Brain Frog is a playful Show HN about squeezing randomness from a tiny 11-line JavaScript program, challenging notions of entropy and RNG quality in highly compact code.
items.summary_zh: Brain Frog 是一个有趣的 Show HN 项目，用极简的 11 行 JavaScript 代码尝试产生看似随机的输出，挑战对熵和伪随机数质量的直觉。

items.title_en: You're probably using Agent Skills wrong
items.title_zh: 你可能在错误使用 Agent Skills
items.summary_en: Argues that many practitioners misuse 'agent skills' in AI workflows and offers guidelines for designing reusable, composable skills with sensible governance.
items.summary_zh: 指出许多从业者在 AI 工作流中错误使用“agent skills”，并给出设计可重用、可组合技能以及合理治理的指南。

items.title_en: Task Failed Successfully: Saturating NIC and Disk Bandwidth
items.title_zh: 任务失败地成功了：让 NIC 与磁盘带宽达到饱和
items.summary_en: A technical exploration of pushing NIC and disk bandwidth to the limit, including benchmarks, bottlenecks, and interpreting results when tests 'succeed' despite nonstandard failure messages. It offers practical tips for rigorous, repeatable performance testing.
items.summary_zh: 对将网卡与磁盘带宽推至极限的技术性探讨，涵盖基准测试、瓶颈分析及在“任务失败但结果看似成功”情形下的解读。提供实施严谨、可重复性能测试的实用建议。

items.title_en: Apple just Increased Prices: here’s what’s changed
items.title_zh: 苹果再涨价：具体变化一览
items.summary_en: MacRumors outlines exactly what Apple changed in its pricing, which SKUs were affected and by how much. The piece helps consumers and retailers understand the real impact of the price uptick across devices and regions.
items.summary_zh: MacRumors 详细梳理了苹果价格调整的具体变化、受影响的型号及涨价幅度，帮助消费者和零售商理解此次涨价在各设备与区域上的实际影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: I rebuilt the only parts of my IDE I use, in Rust, over a weekend
items.title_zh: 我用 Rust 重写了自己实际使用的 IDE 部分功能
items.summary_en: A developer rebuilt the parts of their IDE they actually use in Rust over a weekend, reporting improvements in safety and speed. The project demonstrates what a small, focused rewrite can achieve for personal tooling and might inspire others to rethink monolithic IDEs.
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者在短短一个周末用 Rust 重写了自己实际使用的 IDE 部分功能，报告了在安全性与速度方面的提升。这一小规模、聚焦的重写展示了个人工具的潜力，也可能激励他人重新审视庞大 IDE 的设计。

items.title_en: My 1992 view of the problems of computer programming in 1992
items.title_zh: 我对 1992 年计算机编程问题的看法（1992 年）
items.summary_en: A personal reflection on the programming problems of 1992, touching on language limitations, tooling gaps, and debugging challenges. The piece contrasts past constraints with today’s practices, offering lessons in software reliability and evolution. It reminds readers that much of modern software discipline has deep historical roots.
items.summary_zh: 个人回顾1992年的编程难题，涉及语言局限、工具不足与调试挑战。与今日实践相比，提出关于软件可靠性与演化的历史视角与教训，提醒我们现代软件规范的诸多根源来自更早的历史。

items.title_en: The eerie interface of man and machine (Life Magazine, October 1967)
items.title_zh: 人机界面的怪异之感（1967 年 Life 杂志）
items.summary_en: An archival look at mid-century visions of human-machine interfaces, capturing how designers imagined future interactions with machines. The piece reflects on aesthetics, optimism, and unease that linger in early interface design and set the stage for later HCI innovations.
items.summary_zh: 回顾二十世纪中期关于人机界面的设想，描绘设计者如何想象人与机器交互。文章揭示早期界面设计中的美学、乐观与不安，以及它们为后来的人机交互创新奠定了基础。

items.title_en: Tata Electronics cyber breach claiming to expose Apple, Tesla trade secrets
items.title_zh: Tata Electronics 网络入侵声称曝光苹果、特斯拉商业机密
items.summary_en: A cyber breach at Tata Electronics is alleged to expose trade secrets related to major tech companies, raising concerns about supply chain security in the electronics sector. The incident spotlights the ongoing cyber risk facing global manufacturing and R&D collaborations.
items.summary_zh: 塔塔电子的网络攻击事件被指暴露苹果、特斯拉等公司的商业机密，凸显电子行业在供应链安全方面的持续网络风险。此事凸显全球制造与研发合作面临的网络威胁。

items.title_en: Why Dark Sky Lighting?
items.title_zh: 为什么要暗夜天空照明？
items.summary_en: Dark sky lighting designs reduce light pollution, helping keep skies dark for stargazing, preserve nocturnal ecosystems, and improve energy efficiency. The piece outlines practical guidelines for street and outdoor lighting that minimize glare while maintaining safety.
items.summary_zh: 暗夜天空照明能降低光污染，保护夜空观星环境、改善野生动物栖息与能源效率。文章提出了降低眩光、保持安全的城市照明设计要点，帮助城市走向更可持续的夜间照明。

items.title_en: Researchers have developed pixels that can emit and analyse light together
items.title_zh: 能同时发光与探测光的新型像素
items.summary_en: Researchers created a pixel that can both emit and sense light, enabling on-chip optical emission and sensing. This dual-functionality could simplify photonic circuits, improve LiDAR, and unlock new sensor applications, pushing the boundary of imaging tech.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发出能同时发光和探测光的新型像素，有望简化集成光子电路并推进激光雷达、光学传感等新应用。该双功能像素可能开启新的成像与传感能力。

items.title_en: 1M Passports Leaked Online
items.title_zh: 一百万份护照数据泄露在线
items.summary_en: A leak exposed about one million passports online, underscoring serious privacy, identity, and border security risks in an era of sprawling data exposés.
items.summary_zh: 约一百万份护照数据在网上泄露，凸显在大数据暴露潮中隐私、身份与边境安全的严重风险。

items.title_en: A peek into Reddit's anti-spam internals
items.title_zh: 窥探 Reddit 的反垃圾内部机制
items.summary_en: The post reveals how Reddit's anti-spam systems function behind the scenes, detailing detection signals, automation, and human moderation. It discusses trade-offs between false positives and user experience, and what this means for platform trust and policy.
items.summary_zh: 文章揭示了 Reddit 反垃圾系统的内部运作，包括检测信号、自动化流程和人工审核的协同。讨论了误报与用户体验之间的权衡，以及对平台信任与政策的影响。

items.title_en: Do LLMs pass the mirror test?
items.title_zh: LLMs 能通过镜像测试吗？
items.summary_en: They explore whether current LLMs can demonstrate self-recognition or mirror-like understanding, shedding light on the limits of self-modeling in language models. The results suggest LLMs still lack genuine self-awareness, with implications for how we evaluate introspection in AI.
items.summary_zh: 研究探讨当前的 LLM 是否具备自我识别能力或镜像测试中的自我理解，揭示语言模型自我建模能力的局限。结果表明，LLMs 仍然缺乏真正的自我意识，这对评估 AI 的内省能力具有影响。

items.title_en: Reflecting to optimise
items.title_zh: 反思以优化
items.summary_en: A meditation on using reflection and feedback loops to optimize systems and workflows. It argues that thoughtful introspection can reveal bottlenecks and guide better improvements than brute-force tweaking.
items.summary_zh: 通过反思和反馈循环来优化系统与工作流的思考。认为深思熟虑的自省能揭示瓶颈，为改进提供方向，优于单纯的强力调整。

items.title_en: Herdr: Agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal
items.title_zh: Herdr：在终端里运行的代理多路复用器
items.summary_en: Herdr is a terminal-centric tool that multiplexes multiple AI agents, letting you route tasks and keep context within a single shell. It simplifies managing several assistants side-by-side and can boost productivity in CLI-heavy workflows.
items.summary_zh: Herdr 是一个在终端内工作的代理多路复用器，允许同时运行和切换多个代理，方便在一个 shell 中分派任务、维持上下文。对以 CLI 为主的工作流来说，可以显著提升效率。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Is there a bad employers (who have a records of not paying) list?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：是否存在不支付工资记录的雇主名单？
items.summary_en: People are asking for experiences and compiling a list of employers with a track record of not paying workers. The discussion weighs the value of crowdsourced warnings against potential defamation risk and encourages due diligence when switching jobs.
items.summary_zh: 社区成员分享与记录不支付工资的雇主，以便给求职者警示。讨论同时评估众包警示的价值与潜在的诽谤风险，并倡导求职者在跳槽前进行尽职调查。

items.title_en: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model
items.title_zh: 白宫要求 OpenAI 放缓新模型发布
items.summary_en: The White House asks OpenAI to slow-roll the release of its new model due to safety concerns, signaling increased regulatory scrutiny of AI advances. The move could influence policy dialogue and market expectations around AI capabilities and governance.
items.summary_zh: 白宫要求 OpenAI 基于安全担忧放慢新模型的发布节奏，标志着对 AI 进展的监管关注再度升温。此举可能影响政策讨论和市场对 AI 能力与治理的预期。

items.title_en: Microbubbles in Medicine
items.title_zh: 医学中的微泡研究
items.summary_en: Microbubbles are gaining traction in medicine for imaging and therapy, leveraging ultrasound-triggered effects for targeted delivery and enhanced contrast. The piece surveys potential clinical uses, safety considerations, and the engineering challenges to scale production.
items.summary_zh: 微泡在医学领域的应用日益受到关注，可用于超声成像和治疗，通过超声触发实现靶向药物递送与对比增强。文章梳理了潜在的临床应用、安全性考量以及规模化生产面临的工程挑战。

items.title_en: British Origami: the 1955 exhibition by Akira Yoshizawa (2005)
items.title_zh: 英国折纸：1955 年 Akira Yoshizawa 的展览
items.summary_en: The 1955 exhibition by Akira Yoshizawa in Britain helped popularize origami as a modern art and design discipline, influencing education and craft worldwide.
items.summary_zh: 1955 年 Akira Yoshizawa 在英国举办的展览推动了折纸成为现代艺术与设计学科，影响了全球的教育与工艺实践。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What is everyone in SF talking about?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：现在旧金山的人都在谈论什么？
items.summary_en: Contributors share what topics are capturing attention in San Francisco's tech scene, from startups and funding to housing and policy issues. The thread offers a snapshot of the city's current concerns and priorities.
items.summary_zh: 社区成员分享旧金山科技圈当前最热的讨论话题，从初创公司与投资到住房与政策议题，展现这座城市的关注点与优先级。

items.title_en: Mullvad founder gave millions to extremist far right party
items.title_zh: Mullvad 创始人向极端右派政党捐款数百万
items.summary_en: Mullvad’s founder reportedly donated millions to an extremist far-right party, a revelation that sparks debate about the ethics of privacy-centered startups and how political alignment affects user trust.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，Mullvad 的创始人向极端右派政党捐款数百万，这一披露引发关于隐私为本的初创公司伦理及政治立场对用户信任影响的讨论。文章探讨对品牌、问责与平台可信度的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Computer-Aided Language Development in Nonspeaking Children (1968) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 非语言表达儿童的电脑辅助语言发展（1968）
items.summary_en: This 1968 paper documents early computer-aided approaches to language development in nonspeaking children, foreshadowing assistive tech and human-computer interaction in education. It shows how early researchers used machines to support communication and learning.
items.summary_zh: 这篇1968年的论文记录了早期计算机辅助的非语言表达儿童语言发展方法，预示了教育领域的辅助技术与人机交互。研究展示了通过机器来支持沟通与学习的初步尝试。

items.title_en: Armadillo – A DNS Server in Gleam for Homelab Use
items.title_zh: Armadillo — 面向家庭实验室的 Gleam DNS 服务器
items.summary_en: Armadillo is a Gleam-based DNS server tailored for home-lab use, focusing on simplicity, speed, or ease of deployment. The project demonstrates how a modern language stack can power practical network services in hobbyist environments.
items.summary_zh: Armadillo 是一个基于 Gleam 的 DNS 服务器，专为家庭实验室环境设计，强调简单易用与部署便捷。该项目展示了现代语言栈在业余网络服务中的实际应用潜力。

items.title_en: Can China build its own ASML?
items.title_zh: 中国能否造出自己的 ASML？
items.summary_en: Assesses the feasibility and milestones for China to rival ASML’s lithography tech, highlighting major technical hurdles and strategic investments. A potential shift in semiconductor manufacturing and global supply chains if progress accelerates.
items.summary_zh: 评估中国在高端光刻设备领域自研能力的可行性与里程碑，凸显关键技术难题与战略投资。若取得进展，可能改变半导体制造格局及全球供应链。

items.title_en: Is America becoming a gerontocracy?
items.title_zh: 美国是否正在走向老年治理？
items.summary_en: Raises questions about the aging leadership in American politics and its implications for policy dynamism and reform. The piece weaves demographic trends with governance considerations, highlighting tensions between continuity and renewal.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨美国政治领域的高龄化及其对政策响应、创新与代际结构的潜在影响。结合人口统计数据与治理考量，提出在延续性与变革之间存在的张力。

items.title_en: AgentKits – 60 production-ready AI agent blueprints with guardrails
items.title_zh: AgentKits：60 个可直接用于生产的 AI 代理蓝图，附守卫条款
items.summary_en: AgentKits provides 60 production-ready AI agent blueprints with guardrails, helping teams deploy reliable agents safely. The collection accelerates experimentation and reduces integration risk for enterprise AI projects.
items.summary_zh: AgentKits 提供 60 套可直接用于生产的 AI 代理蓝图，并附带守卫条款，帮助团队在安全前提下部署可靠的代理。这一集合能加速企业 AI 项目的试验与落地，降低集成风险。

items.title_en: Eyewitness at the Triangle (1911)
items.title_zh: 1911年三角火灾的目击者
items.summary_en: Recounts an eyewitness account from the 1911 Triangle Shirtwaist Factory fire, illustrating the human side of a pivotal event in labor history and its role in spurring reforms.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1911年三角厂火灾的现场目击者叙述，展现这一事件的人性一面及其推动劳工改革的历史影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Autofit2 – End-to-end pipeline for multilingual text classification
items.title_zh: Autofit2：多语言文本分类的端到端管线
items.summary_en: Showcasing Autofit2, an end-to-end pipeline for multilingual text classification, aiming to simplify data prep, model training, and evaluation across languages. It provides a reusable workflow that accelerates building and evaluating multilingual classifiers for real-world apps.
items.summary_zh: 展示 Autofit2——一个面向多语言文本分类的端到端流水线，简化数据准备、模型训练与评估流程，适用于多语言场景的实际应用。该项目提供了可复用的工作流，帮助快速建立与评估跨语言分类模型。

items.title_en: Lippmann Photography
items.title_zh: 利普曼摄影艺术
items.summary_en: Showcases Lippmann photography, a 19th-century color process that records colors in a single exposure using interference patterns.
items.summary_zh: 介绍利普曼摄影，一种19世纪的单次曝光彩色成像工艺，利用干涉图样记录色彩。文献展示了历史背景、技法要点以及代表性作品，揭示化学、光学与艺术的交汇。

items.title_en: Show HN: Starglyphs - A constellation puzzle game based on Euler paths
items.title_zh: Show HN：Starglyphs——基于欧拉路径的星座解谜游戏
items.summary_en: Starglyphs is a constellation puzzle game built around Eulerian paths, challenging players to trace routes through star patterns. It illustrates how classic math concepts can become engaging, accessible gameplay.
items.summary_zh: Starglyphs 以欧拉路径为核心的星座解谜游戏，玩家需在星图中绘制路线。展示了把数学概念转化为有趣、易上手的解谜游戏的可能。

items.title_en: Experiments in Sports Seismology for the World Cup
items.title_zh: 世界杯赛事中的运动地震学实验
items.summary_en: Researchers describe experiments using seismic sensors to study World Cup events, capturing crowd-induced vibrations and other signals. The work reveals how human activity translates into measurable ground motion and can inform safety and event analytics.
items.summary_zh: 研究团队介绍在世界杯赛期间使用地震仪进行实验，记录观众带来的振动与其他信号。此类研究揭示人类活动如何转化为可测量的地表数据，并可用于安全与事件分析。

items.title_en: The Art of Kite Flying (1430–1929)
items.summary_en: Overview of historical kite art spanning 1430–1929, highlighting cultural significance, craftsmanship, and early technology intersections with aerodynamics. The collection showcases how kites migrated across cultures and influenced visual art, science, and play.
items.summary_zh: 梳理自 1430 年至 1929 年的风筝艺术史，强调其文化意义、工艺美与早期科技在空气动力学中的交汇。收藏展现了风筝如何跨文化传播并影响艺术、科学与娱乐。

items.title_en: Anthropic says Alibaba used 25k accounts to mine Claude
items.title_zh: Anthropic 称阿里巴巴动用 2.5 万个账户挖掘 Claude
items.summary_en: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of using 25,000 accounts to mine Claude's capabilities, signaling a high-stakes dispute over access, credential abuse, and IP in AI services.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 指控阿里巴巴动用 2.5 万个账户来挖掘 Claude 的能力，凸显在 AI 服务接入、凭据滥用和知识产权方面的高强度对峙与挑战。

items.title_en: Texas Man Gets 30 Years in Prison for Transporting 'Anti-Government' Pamphlets
items.title_zh: 德州男子因运送反政府传单获刑30年
items.summary_en: Reason reports a Texas man receiving a 30-year sentence for transporting anti-government pamphlets, a case that raises questions about free speech limits and prosecutorial reach.
items.summary_zh: Reason报道一名德州男子因运送反政府传单被判处30年监禁，此案引发对言论自由边界与检控范围的讨论。

items.title_en: Set Up Your Own DoH Service
items.title_zh: 搭建自己的 DoH 服务
items.summary_en: A practical guide to hosting your own DNS-over-HTTPS service, covering deployment options, privacy benefits, and potential pitfalls like performance bottlenecks. It helps readers take control of their DNS privacy.
items.summary_zh: 提供搭建自有 DoH 服务的实用指南，讨论部署选项、隐私收益以及潜在的性能瓶颈等要点。

items.title_en: Mojo programming language will become open-source soon
items.title_zh: Mojo 编程语言即将开源
items.summary_en: Mojo, a high-performance language from Modular, will soon be open-sourced, potentially unlocking broader adoption for AI and systems programming. Expect community-driven tooling, governance questions, and licensing considerations as the project moves to public collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Mojo 将很快开源，有望推动在 AI 与系统编程领域的更广泛应用。随着向公开协作的过渡，社区工具、治理结构和许可问题将成为关注焦点。
